Thriller, starring Joanne Froggatt, Ioan Gruffudd and Warren Brown

programme.title: Liar
programme.desc: Terrified of being arrested, Andrew enlists Luke's help to set up an alibi, but Laura does not give up easily and the final confrontation between the two may have violent consequences. The concluding part of Harry and Jack Williams' thriller, which followed the lives of teacher Laura Nielson and widowed surgeon Andrew Earlham after they found themselves entangled in a web of deceit and confusion after enjoying a date together. Starring Joanne Froggatt and Ioan Gruffudd, with Danny Webb and Shelley Conn

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A confrontation between hunt stewards and saboteurs leads to the suspicious death of a protester - and makes Jack wonder whether the thrill of the chase has given the horsey set a taste for human blood. Whodunit, starring David Jason as DI Frost, with Bruce Alexander, Sean Pertwee, Del Henney and Tat Whalley

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sally and Mike bring home a tramp, much to Sid's disgust. Comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid revolts against the chairman of the local residents association

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper Belgian sleuth goes on an Egyptian cruise on board an old steamer, but when an American heiress is murdered, his little grey cells go into overdrive. On questioning each of his fellow passengers, he realises many of them have secrets they want to remain hidden. David Suchet stars, with James Fox, Judy Parfitt, Emily Blunt, Daisy Donovan, Frances de la Tour and David Soul

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The detective investigates after a botanist accidentally unearths the body of a recently buried professor who was fixated upon solving a seemingly impossible riddle by Lewis Carroll. The victim had a long-standing rivalry with his brother - giving Lewis and Hathaway an obvious suspect - but the case is hindered by the mind games of two students who seem intent on causing trouble in their quest to gain admittance to a mysterious club. Guest starring Celia Imrie and James Fleet, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Local boxer John Kinsella's successful world title bid stirs up hidden passions among the residents of Midsomer Morchard. As plans to stage a celebratory re-enactment of a Victorian prizefight shape up, jealousy, betrayal and blackmail take a ringside seat, while two suspicious deaths suggest Barnaby has let friendship cloud his judgement. Detective drama, guest starring Phil Daniels (Quadrophenia, EastEnders), with John Nettles and Jason Hughes

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A planning dispute leads to murder after a stalwart in the Midsomer Conservation Society suspects her neighbours are involved in a money-making development scam. Political wrangling, burglaries and sexual liaisons abound in picturesque Great Pelfe as Barnaby and Jones investigate. Guest starring Hugo Speer (Bleak House), with John Nettles, Jason Hughes and Jane Wymark

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: DCI Tom Barnaby reluctantly joins wife Joyce on a spa weekend at Swavely Manor, a country house offering treatments to soothe the mind and body. However, as he attempts to unwind, a woman is found dead in a flotation chamber and he promptly abandons his therapy to investigate - but the body count soon rises. The detective eventually wraps up the case, but it proves to be his last as he makes a big decision about his future. John Nettles' final appearance in the long-running series, with guest stars Ronni Ancona, Geraldine James and Lesley Manville

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A walk in the woods leads to tragedy for Emily Simpson, who witnesses something unsettling before being found dead in her cottage by old friend Lucy Bellringer. Convinced natural causes are not to blame, Lucy calls in DCI Barnaby and Sergeant Troy, whose investigation eventually uncovers sinister long-buried secrets. The first ever episode of the long-running detective drama, guest starring Jessica Hynes and Emily Mortimer

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Keen to unwind, Geordie and Will head to a charity boxing match at Vic's gym. However, as Matthew and Luke face off in the ring the bout takes an unexpected twist. Will wonders if he's misjudged Matthew all along and when two boys are later found near death, Will must face up to his own part in the tragedy to help uncover the truth. Meanwhile, Leonard tries to reunite the warring Chapmans, who seem determined never to see eye-to-eye again. Robson Green, Tom Brittney and Al Weaver star

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead laid out in the shape of a crucifix on Jesus Green, Will and Geordie are led to a nearby convent where they meet steely Sister Grace, who rules over her flock with an iron fist. Even more sinister is the picture that starts to emerge as they match the nuns to a series of unsolved missing persons cases from the previous five years. Meanwhile, when Leonard's father, Russell, arrives in Grantchester, it's clear there's no love lost between parent and son. Robson Green, Tom Brittney, Tracy-Ann Oberman and Sean Gilder star

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part two of two. The detective and his team find themselves investigating the murder of one of their own. Cabbot is convinced there is a link between the deaths of Lucy Payne and her colleague, but is dismissed as trying to push her career ambitions. However, after receiving new information from another force, she begins to uncover the real connection between the killings. Andrea Lowe stars

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part one of two. The detective is drawn into the criminal underworld of Soho when he reluctantly accepts an unofficial request from Chief Superintendent Rydell to find his missing daughter. Meanwhile, an armed robbery in Eastvale turns into a murder investigation after the perpetrator is found dead in his home and when a battered body is found in a local nightclub, the identity of the victim leads Banks and Cabbot to a devastating realisation about both cases

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part two of two. A surveillance operation establishes a clear link between the murders of Charles McKay and Barry Clough and the subsequent investigation takes a number of alarming twists before uncovering a conspiracy pointing to one of the team being an informer. As Banks pushes all the suspects hard, the case threatens to undermine his integrity as an officer and brings his relationship with Cabbot to breaking point

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is asked to investigate the disappearance of a bank's most valued customer, who had been planning to sell the chairman a map showing where to find a long-lost silver mine. David Suchet stars

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: The couple go to a family wedding, but they don't bargain on Jean's cousin Peggy being there

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Jean and Sally interpret Sid's dreams and Trevor tries to recreate the atmosphere of the previous night

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Billy reports his suspicions to the police, David hears from his house's insurers and Toyah answers tough questions concerning her past

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A professor feels humiliated when her internet dating video is leaked onto a website and watched by her students. The next morning she is found dead, the victim of what appears to be a straightforward suicide. However, Lewis is not convinced and digs deeper, identifying several suspects including the site's founder - but as he and Hathaway get closer to the truth amid a rising death toll, they find their personal and professional lives dredged up online for all to see. Guest starring Roxanne McKee (Game of Thrones) and Toby Stephens (Die Another Day), with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Carry On Cruising (1962)
programme.desc: The captain of a cruise ship bound for the Mediterranean is less than impressed when five of his regular shipmates are replaced at the last minute. Despite their best efforts to earn his respect and an eagerness to please, the new recruits seem doomed to cause chaos whatever they do. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Liz Fraser and Kenneth Connor

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby visits a new age commune, where a man has fallen to his death, or may have been pushed. The dead man turns out to have a connection to the leader's shady past - they set the commune up together as a confidence trick, but the leader came to believe in what he preaches. A further death raises greater suspicion, especially since a vast inheritance might be coming the group's way. Guest starring Stephen Moyer (True Blood)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A prestigious golf club is the setting for murder when a player is bludgeoned to death on the 13th hole. Barnaby and Jones discover gambling, illegal money-lending and assault are rife among the snobbish members, who are also dismissive of the local villagers and only allow them on the course for a few hours a week. Before long, another body turns up, making the detectives doubly determined to catch this terror of the fairways. John Nettles and Jason Hughes star, with guest appearances by Nicholas Le Prevost, John Standing and real-life golfer Sam Torrance

programme.title: Inside the Crown: Secrets of the Royals
programme.desc: The documentary explores how the Queen has responded in times of sadness and grief, as she faced personal tragedies and national disasters including the Aberfan disaster, the Grenfell fire, and the IRA's murder of Lord Mountbatten. The Queen also faced her so-called 'Annus Horribilis' in 1992, when family scandal, press ridicule and the catastrophic Windsor Castle fire tested her skills as monarch and mother to the limit, and, of course the death of Diana, Princess of Wales, when her slow response to the nation's grief threatened to destabilise the monarchy

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A dentist falls in love with his young assistant. His anxious wife, believing he has made plans to poison her and thereby remove the main obstacle to happiness, calls for Poirot's help. Drama, starring David Suchet

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part one of two. The detective receives a disturbing phone message from estranged brother Roy and heads to Harrogate to find him. Meanwhile at a murder scene, the team is introduced to new recruit Helen Morton, who quickly alienates her colleagues with her tactless style. The officer then makes matters worse when she finds evidence linking Banks to the victim's body and speculates he could be a suspect. Unaware everyone is searching for him, the DCI begins to delve into Roy's life and soon uncovers questionable business transactions and associates. Crime drama, starring Stephen Tompkinson, with Caroline Catz (Doc Martin) and Andrea Lowe

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part two of two. The detective visits his childhood home to break the news of Roy's death, and his parents plead with him to find out what happened. Defying Morton, Banks returns to the station in an attempt to lead the investigation into the murders of his brother and Jennifer Lewis, and both officers are convinced the key to cracking the cases lies with a woman being treated at a clinic. Crime drama, starring Stephen Tompkinson and Caroline Catz

programme.title: Davina McCall: Life at the Extreme
programme.desc: Davina travels to the Costa Rican jungle, which is one of the wettest and most humid places on earth, but is a habitat in which animals thrive and is home to around 500,000 species. She learns about the ways in which creatures including sloths, poison dart frogs, tarantulas, tapirs, fer-de-lance vipers, common basilisks and spider monkeys have adapted to the conditions, before spending a night high up in the treetops of the rainforest - where a lightning striking directly overhead forces an abrupt change of plans

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective is summoned to a hotel by a mysterious veiled lady who tells him that her forthcoming marriage is under threat because she is being blackmailed over a love letter. Drama, starring David Suchet and Frances Barber

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid is not feeling his usual self, so he goes to see the doctor

programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: A mentally unbalanced criminal sets out in search of vengeance for the death of his brother and frames Harry for murder. Drama, starring Robert Vaughn, Nyree Dawn Porter and Tony Anholt

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter discover a road accident victim was a gang member involved in a wages robbery, and Regan is determined to nail the modern-day Bonnie and Clyde who have already made fools of the police. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Crusty senior diplomat Mycroft Holmes enlists the help of his more famous younger brother Sherlock to recover missing submarine plans vital to national security. Guest starring Charles Gray

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed and Emma embark on a hunt for a dying agent's hidden dispatch box containing secret information. However, their quest is hindered by obstacles including a car simulator that electrifies its passengers

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: When Ray's van breaks down, Arthur takes to the water using a barge to transport a cargo of dodgy video recorders. However, the fearsome Bible-quoting Welshman who owns them is on his tail. George Cole and Gary Webster star

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's former girlfriend visits from East Germany and he finds himself framed for carrying out an assassination attempt - leaving Doyle with no choice but to bring him in for questioning. Drama, starring Lewis Collins and Martin Shaw

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A member of a group of convicts slips off the roof and dies during a robbery. The apparent leader of the gang appears to be having doubts about his life and Regan senses he is deliberately pointing clues in a desire to be caught during his next job. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: Tour de France Highlights
programme.desc: The key moments from stage 18, featuring a mountainous 175km course from Meribel to La Roche-sur-Foron. Gary Imlach presents, with analysis from Chris Boardman and Peter Kennaugh, reports by Daniel Friebe and Matthew Rendell, and commentary from Ned Boulting and David Millar

programme.title: Tour de France Live 2020
programme.desc: Coverage of stage 19, featuring a flat 166.5km course from Bourg-en-Bresse to Champagnole. Gary Imlach presents, with analysis from Chris Boardman and Peter Kennaugh, reports by Daniel Friebe and Matthew Rendell, and commentary from Ned Boulting and David Millar

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle investigate the death of a burglar who was killed after seeing classified information about a foreign country, and resort to theft in a bid to uncover the embassy's sinister secrets. Liz Fraser and Michael Elphick guest star

programme.desc: Highlights from the ITV Sport archive

programme.title: World Cup Top Goalscorers
programme.desc: Some of the best strikers in the history of the football World Cup

programme.title: Tour de France Highlights
programme.desc: Action from stage 19, featuring a flat 166.5km course from Bourg-en-Bresse to Champagnole. Gary Imlach presents, with analysis from Chris Boardman and Peter Kennaugh, reports by Daniel Friebe and Matthew Rendell, and commentary from Ned Boulting and David Millar

programme.title: World Series of Darts Finals
programme.desc: Coverage of the opening day of the tournament, staged at the Salzburgarena in Austria, where Michael van Gerwen is the defending champion. The Dutchman is the top seed in the field of 24 players, with the likes of Peter Wright, Gerwyn Price and Michael Smith among the other favourites. This is the sixth staging of the event, and van Gerwen has been victorious on all but one occasion, when James Wade claimed the title in 2018. Presented by Jacqui Oatley, with analysis by Chris Mason and Alan Warriner-Little, and commentary by John Rawling and Stuart Pyke

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling, featuring all of the biggest stars on the roster, including Adam Page, Chris Jericho, Cody and Jon Moxley.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: A report from Southeast Asia, of something in the water that's sliced cleanly through a young man's testicles, is enough to lure 'fishing detective' Jeremy Wade to the shores of the Mekong - a river long renowned for its monstrous fish. But what kind of creature could have inflicted such a distinctive, surgical wound? In his quest to expose the unseen mutilator, Jeremy uncovers multiple victims who've been mauled, half-blinded, and even fatally wounded by the same mysterious assailant - a baby-faced killer that appears to be proliferating

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Richard Henwood presents action from obscure motorsports, such as bus and caravan racing and ice speedway

programme.title: ITV4 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: British Touring Cars
programme.desc: A look at some of the biggest crashes from the past 15 years of the British Touring Car Championship, featuring interviews with Tim Harvey, Tom Chilton, Matt Jackson and Gordon Shedden

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: The team need to protect the only eye-witness of a drug-running racket. Drama, starring Robert Vaughn, Nyree Dawn Porter and Tony Anholt

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: As whole estates of houses begin to crumble, CI5 uncovers corruption surrounding the awarding of contracts to build homes. Maurice Denham and Bill Fraser guest star alongside Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A bad dream has Regan's girlfriend fearing for his safety, and her visions ring true when he gets involved in a case involving a stolen lorryload of cigars. The plot thickens when illicit cocaine is retrieved and arms stolen from the US are discovered to be on their way to a military faction in Ireland. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur comes up with a plan to boost business at the Winchester Club by staging variety nights. The idea proves popular until the karaoke machine, rented from the fearsome Gabadini family, is stolen. George Cole stars

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show
programme.desc: Rishi Persad and the team are based at Newbury to look ahead to some competitive action at the track, plus all the latest news from Ayr ahead of the Gold Cup

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore presents action from November 1974, including West Ham United v Middlesbrough, Manchester United v Oxford United and Sheffield United v Carlisle United

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the mysterious deaths of fishermen in Alaska. A recent fatal incident sends him on a search for possible suspects - first through treacherous rapids, then down to the river-mouth where the icy waters are swarming with sharks. Yet it's an unexpected beast, hauled up from the depths, that eventually emerges as his deadliest contender

programme.title: Fishing Allstars
programme.desc: Dean Macey and Adam Rooney travel across Italy, with their main target a monster wels catfish of up to 300lbs in the River Po. They also aim to catch smaller channel catfish from the River Arno and carp from a stunning mountain lake near Bologna

programme.title: Tour de France Highlights
programme.desc: Action from stage 19, featuring a flat 166.5km course from Bourg-en-Bresse to Champagnole. Gary Imlach presents, with analysis from Chris Boardman and Peter Kennaugh, reports by Daniel Friebe and Matthew Rendell, and commentary from Ned Boulting and David Millar

programme.title: Tour de France Live 2020
programme.desc: Coverage of the 20th and penultimate stage of the most prestigious race on the calendar, featuring a 36.2km individual time-trial between Lure and La Planche des Belles Filles. Gary Imlach presents, with analysis from Chris Boardman and Peter Kennaugh, reports by Daniel Friebe and Matthew Rendell, and commentary from Ned Boulting and David Millar

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: The team film their first-ever episode in the UK, from the Wasing Estate in Berkshire, which has a number of lakes and was previously the home of the British record carp. Ali, Neil and Tom find it difficult to tempt the carp as this lake has been fished regularly by other anglers, and these old fish have seen everything over the years

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade returns to Africa's Okavango Delta to reinvestigate the tigerfish - a pack-hunting carnivore previously blamed for mauling the victims of a capsized boat. If these fish are as lethal as Jeremy concluded, then why aren't there more reports of fatal, piranha-like attacks? In a bid to flush out the true nature of these sight-hunting predators, Jeremy puts on his dive gear and offers himself as live bait

programme.title: Tour de France Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the 20th and penultimate stage of the most prestigious race on the calendar, featuring a 36.2km individual time-trial between Lure and La Planche des Belles Filles. Gary Imlach presents, with analysis from Chris Boardman and Peter Kennaugh, reports by Daniel Friebe and Matthew Rendell, and commentary from Ned Boulting and David Millar

programme.title: World Series of Darts Finals
programme.desc: Coverage of day two of the tournament, staged at the Salzburgarena in Austria, where eight second-round matches take place, with eight seeded players facing the first-round winners. James Wade's reign as champion came to an end at this stage last year wjhen he was edged out 6-5 by Jonny Clayton, and eventual title-winner Michael van Gerwen overcame Gerwyn Price by the same scoreline. Presented by Jacqui Oatley, with analysis by Chris Mason and Alan Warriner-Little, and commentary by John Rawling and Stuart Pyke

programme.title: Oblivion (2013)
programme.desc: A repairman is assigned to salvage the remaining resources from Earth, which has been left a devastated wasteland after a war with an alien race. He discovers a human survivor on the surface of the planet, an encounter that exposes secrets from the past that threaten the future of the human race. Sci-fi adventure, starring Tom Cruise and Morgan Freeman

programme.title: DTM Highlights 2020
programme.desc: The mid-way point of the 2020 DTM season is held on the GP layout of the famed Nurburgring. The venue for Round 5 in the Eifel region is notorious for its weather - as well as spectacular overtaking moves into turn one. The Nurburgring saw the lone win for Britain's Jamie Green in the 2019 season, as the Audi driver will be tested against new competition including former F1 star Robert Kubica.

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 is assigned to protect an Middle Eastern diplomat who is being pursued by assassins. Bodie and Doyle find themselves relentlessly pursued by a gang of assailants that seems able to accurately anticipate their every move, leading to a tense car chase and a riverside shoot-out. Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: The Contessa gives Harry a shotgun for his birthday, which he is soon given cause to use when he becomes the target of a manhunt while investigating political blackmail

programme.title: World Series of Darts Finals
programme.desc: Coverage of the afternoon session on day three of the tournament, staged at the Salzburgarena in Austria, featuring the quarter-finals. Presented by Jacqui Oatley, with analysis by Chris Mason and Alan Warriner-Little, and commentary by John Rawling and Stuart Pyke

programme.title: Tour de France Live 2020
programme.desc: Coverage of the 21st and final stage of this year's race, as the riders take on a flat 122km course from Mantes-la-Jolie to the Champs-Elysees in the heart of Paris. Gary Imlach presents, with analysis from Chris Boardman and Peter Kennaugh, reports by Daniel Friebe and Matthew Rendell, and commentary from Ned Boulting and David Millar

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: From Canada's waterlogged wilderness come stories of a 20ft lake monster that attacks humans. For freshwater detective Jeremy Wade, investigation turns into obsession as he tries to explain widespread accounts of the aggressive serpent-like beast

programme.title: World Series of Darts Finals
programme.desc: Coverage of the evening session on day three of the tournament, staged at the Salzburgarena in Austria, featuring the semi-finals and final. Michael van Gerwen and Danny Noppert defeated Mensur Suljovic and Dave Chisnall respectively in the last four of 2019 to set up an all-Dutch final, and van Gerwen proved to be too much for his compatriot, comfortably prevailing 11-2. Presented by Jacqui Oatley, with analysis by Chris Mason and Alan Warriner-Little, and commentary by John Rawling and Stuart Pyke

programme.title: The Big Fish Off
programme.desc: Jimmy Bullard and Jamie O'Hara join team captains Ali Hamidi and Dean Macey at Anglers Paradise in Devon, trying to catch ornamental koi carp, blue orfe and golden tench

programme.desc: Action from stage 19, featuring a flat 166.5km course from Bourg-en-Bresse to Champagnole. Gary Imlach presents, with analysis from Chris Boardman and Peter Kennaugh, reports by Daniel Friebe and Matthew Rendell, and commentary from Ned Boulting and David Millar

programme.title: World Series of Darts Finals
programme.desc: Coverage of the opening day of the tournament, staged at the Salzburgarena in Austria, where Michael van Gerwen is the defending champion. The Dutchman is the top seed in the field of 24 players, with the likes of Peter Wright, Gerwyn Price and Michael Smith among the other favourites. This is the sixth staging of the event, and van Gerwen has been victorious on all but one occasion, when James Wade claimed the title in 2018. Presented by Jacqui Oatley, with analysis by Chris Mason and Alan Warriner-Little, and commentary by John Rawling and Stuart Pyke

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling, featuring all of the biggest stars on the roster, including Adam Page, Chris Jericho, Cody and Jon Moxley.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: A report from Southeast Asia, of something in the water that's sliced cleanly through a young man's testicles, is enough to lure 'fishing detective' Jeremy Wade to the shores of the Mekong - a river long renowned for its monstrous fish. But what kind of creature could have inflicted such a distinctive, surgical wound? In his quest to expose the unseen mutilator, Jeremy uncovers multiple victims who've been mauled, half-blinded, and even fatally wounded by the same mysterious assailant - a baby-faced killer that appears to be proliferating

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Richard Henwood presents action from obscure motorsports, such as bus and caravan racing and ice speedway

programme.title: The Protectors

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A bad dream has Regan's girlfriend fearing for his safety, and her visions ring true when he gets involved in a case involving a stolen lorryload of cigars. The plot thickens when illicit cocaine is retrieved and arms stolen from the US are discovered to be on their way to a military faction in Ireland. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: Minder

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show
programme.desc: Rishi Persad and the team are based at Newbury to look ahead to some competitive action at the track, plus all the latest news from Ayr ahead of the Gold Cup

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore presents action from November 1974, including West Ham United v Middlesbrough, Manchester United v Oxford United and Sheffield United v Carlisle United

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the mysterious deaths of fishermen in Alaska. A recent fatal incident sends him on a search for possible suspects - first through treacherous rapids, then down to the river-mouth where the icy waters are swarming with sharks. Yet it's an unexpected beast, hauled up from the depths, that eventually emerges as his deadliest contender

programme.title: Fishing Allstars
programme.desc: Dean Macey and Adam Rooney travel across Italy, with their main target a monster wels catfish of up to 300lbs in the River Po. They also aim to catch smaller channel catfish from the River Arno and carp from a stunning mountain lake near Bologna

programme.title: Tour de France Highlights

programme.title: Tour de France Live 2020
programme.desc: Coverage of the 20th and penultimate stage of the most prestigious race on the calendar, featuring a 36.2km individual time-trial between Lure and La Planche des Belles Filles. Gary Imlach presents, with analysis from Chris Boardman and Peter Kennaugh, reports by Daniel Friebe and Matthew Rendell, and commentary from Ned Boulting and David Millar

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: The team film their first-ever episode in the UK, from the Wasing Estate in Berkshire, which has a number of lakes and was previously the home of the British record carp. Ali, Neil and Tom find it difficult to tempt the carp as this lake has been fished regularly by other anglers, and these old fish have seen everything over the years

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade returns to Africa's Okavango Delta to reinvestigate the tigerfish - a pack-hunting carnivore previously blamed for mauling the victims of a capsized boat. If these fish are as lethal as Jeremy concluded, then why aren't there more reports of fatal, piranha-like attacks? In a bid to flush out the true nature of these sight-hunting predators, Jeremy puts on his dive gear and offers himself as live bait

programme.title: Tour de France Highlights

programme.title: World Series of Darts Finals
programme.desc: Coverage of day two of the tournament, staged at the Salzburgarena in Austria, where eight second-round matches take place, with eight seeded players facing the first-round winners. James Wade's reign as champion came to an end at this stage last year wjhen he was edged out 6-5 by Jonny Clayton, and eventual title-winner Michael van Gerwen overcame Gerwyn Price by the same scoreline. Presented by Jacqui Oatley, with analysis by Chris Mason and Alan Warriner-Little, and commentary by John Rawling and Stuart Pyke

programme.title: Oblivion (2013)

Sci-fi adventure, starring Tom Cruise and Morgan Freeman

programme.title: Five Guys a Week
programme.desc: Essex-based photographer Chris, haulage guy Lou, shopping centre manager Adam, analytics manager Kris and oven cleaning technician Michael move in with Tara, a 32-year-old business consultant from Halifax in West Yorkshire, each hoping to win her affections. Nearly all of Tara's friends are married, and just about the most serious relationship she had to date has been with Kaiser - her beloved German shepherd. Top of Tara's list of requirements is a man who can make her laugh. Eventually, five become one - will Tara make the right choice?

programme.desc: A Brooklyn bartender secretly provides a service delivering shipments of money to local gangsters. Crime drama based on a short story by Dennis Lehane, starring Tom Hardy, Noomi Rapace and James Gandolfini in his final film role

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Kitchen designer Darren Miller hosts the second dinner in Southampton, throwing a 1990s rave-themed party. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Customer service adviser Greg Bell hosts the third dinner party of the week in Southampton, determined to educate his guests in the art of fine dining. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

The contestants must take on three tricky challenges - a sandwich biscuit for the signature round, a sweet bread-based technical, and a cake showstopper which reveals their favourite guilty pleasure

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Egypt's Lost Pyramid
programme.desc: Documentary following archaeologists working on a 4,000-year-old pyramid containing a burial chamber, still apparently sealed. As light enters the tomb for the first time, the artefacts contained within reveal a gripping detective story as although there are no signs of entry, the contents have been disturbed. To solve the mystery, Egyptologists explore the nearby Black Pyramid to see how pyramid builders used every trick in the book to protect the treasures, discovering a dark and complex labyrinth of dummy tombs, false passages and stone portcullises to fool robbers

programme.title: Lost Pharaohs of the Nile
programme.desc: The work of archaeologists to excavate sites along the Sudanese Nile Valley, from pyramids to temples, which once formed part of Ancient Egypt, ruled by a dynasty known as the Black Pharaohs. Featuring the world's first investigation of the submerged burial chambers of a pyramid, the discovery of what appears to be a major Black Pharaoh power base near the great temple of Jebel Barkal, and using drones to show the full extent of the Black Pharaoh's Kingdom for the first time - the experts in this film challenge the view that Egypt is Africa's only 'great' civilisation

programme.title: Pacific Rim: Uprising (2018)
programme.desc: Ten years after the Pan Pacific Defense Corps unleashed an army of Jaegers - 25-storey tall robots operated by mind-melded humans - former pilot Jake Pentecost is contacted by estranged sister Mako Mori. She implores him to return to the PPDC to head off the threat posed by Liwen Shao, chief executive of Shao Industries, who intends to replace the Jaegers with unmanned drones. Haunted by ghosts of the past, Jake eventually agrees to mentor a 15-year-old cadet called Amara, whose family were crushed to death during one monster attack. Director Steven S DeKnight's literally blockbusting sci-fi sequel, starring John Boyega, Scott Eastwood and Cailee Spaeny

programme.title: Behind Enemy Lines (2001)
programme.desc: A reconnaissance pilot is shot down and becomes stranded in enemy territory after filming evidence of a genocidal massacre by Serb militia in Bosnia. The naval air commander for Nato forces in the Balkans defies orders by mounting an unauthorised mission to rescue him, while the airman faces a battle to stay alive as he is pursued by paramilitary forces. Bosnian War drama, starring Gene Hackman, Owen Wilson, Gabriel Macht and Olek Krupa

programme.title: Scotland's Scenic Railways

programme.title: George Clarke's National Trust Unlocked
programme.desc: In Devon, George visits one of the National Trust's quirkiest buildings, a bear hut on the 6400-acre Killerton estate. The main house was given away because of the socialist ideals of the aristocratic family who lived there. George unearths secrets and scandal at Baddesley Clinton Hall, a fortified Tudor manor house in Warwickshire where in the past the architecture has meant the difference between life and death, then heads home to the north-east for a walk through Gibside Estate, a landscape park with royal connections and crowned with jaw-dropping architecture

programme.title: M&S: The Food Factor
programme.desc: For more than a century, Marks & Spencer has been one of the leading high-street stores, but these days it is under attack from all sides, with budget stores selling cheaper clothes, supermarkets upping the quality of their foods and up-to-date fashions available online. Originally shown on the eve of the company's 2018 report being published, Fiona Phillips speaks to shoppers and former staff to see what can be done to restore the store's fortunes

programme.title: Secret Scotland
programme.desc: The comedian's latest Scottish tour covers Falkirk and the Lothians. She takes a canal boat trip that includes a look behind the scenes at the world's only rotating boat lift. Venturing into Midlothian, she visits a royal hideaway with a dramatic history and tries her hand at falconry. She also visits the site of the world stone-stacking championship and learns the secrets of a small island with links to smuggling that is believed to have inspired Treasure Island

programme.title: Atlantic: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: As winter draws to a close, the Atlantic springs back to life and hope returns. Temperatures rise, days lengthen and food is plentiful again. However, spring in the north is short, the animals only have a few months to find food, a mate and start a family - all the while avoiding predators. Around the British and Irish coast, thousands of gannets that spent winter off southern Europe and north Africa, must find a place to nest before they can raise a family. Meanwhile, killer whales leave Iceland and head to the Shetland Isles, where they hunt harbour seal pups

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: Good Morning Britain co-host Kate Garraway narrates this showcase of unforgettable moments involving TV guests. Gloria Hunniford tells the story of when Bruce Forsyth went walkabout on her chat show, ex-cricketer Monty Panesar relives his disastrous appearance on Celebrity Mastermind, while Jenni Falconer remembers her embarrassing encounter with David Hasselhoff, which caused an audience of millions to cringe. Plus, Star Trek actor William Shatner is seen at his most bizarre. Other less-than-perfect moments involve the likes of Phillip Schofield, Jonathan Ross and legendary punk rock hell-raiser John Lydon

She starts her visit with a water-taxi tour around the bay, and then joins a private walking tour around the heart of the old city, including the fountain, main entrance gates, amphitheatre and finishing at St John's Co-cathedral

programme.title: The Queen vs No 10: Behind Closed Doors

programme.title: 13 Moments...

Through a mixture of archive and expert interviews, the film revisits the key moments that changed the course of the entertainer's life and asks why the truly great seem so often to die young

programme.desc: A look at some of the challenges that Spring can bring to Yorkshire's livestock, wildlife and pets. programme.desc: Sheep shearing season is well under way, but while one young ewe was having her annual trim, there was a terrible accident - Julian Norton arrives to find she's been impaled on a trailer. programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian Norton is called to a late-night calving at local farmer Richard's place to try to help a big calf called Moobaloo. Peter Wright rushes into the practice after a member of the public brings in an owl they suspect was hit by a car. And much loved cat Princess is brought in with a mysterious and horrifying wound on her back end

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter Wright must brave snow blizzards as The Beast from The East arrives and isolates Yorkshire Farmers living on higher ground. The weather doesn't stop him heading out to look at a young cow who's just given birth and is suffering from severe pneumonia

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: Siegfried applies to become attending vet at Darrowby racecourse - but the position comes with conditions, and he is torn between his ambition and his loyalty to the practice. Tristan collects the debts owed to the surgery, but ends up losing all the money and resorts to placing a risky bet to cover up his mistake. When the favourite to win on the race day is diagnosed with a inoperable condition, James has his first painful experience of having to put an animal down - only to end up being threatened with legal action by the owner

programme.title: Yorkshire Tea vs PG Tips: Battle of the Brews
programme.desc: A look at two of Britain's leading producers of tea - the traditional favourite PG Tips and Yorkshire Tea, which topped the tea sales charts for the first time in 2019. These two brands go head to head in a series of categories examining issues including sales, heritage and innovation

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. The programme also reveals how long-fought battles result in Asbos, evictions and sometimes violence

programme.title: Gypsy Eviction: The Battle for Dale Farm
programme.desc: Although travellers legally owned the land of Dale Farm in Essex, they did not have planning permission to develop it and the site grew in size. Early attempts by the council to move them on were thwarted by the New Labour government, and the adoption of the Human Rights Laws resulted in a stalemate between the resident travellers and the council that lasted a decade. Through interviews with people on both sides of the eviction, this film looks back at the dramatic events of 2011

programme.title: Old Wife, New Wife
programme.desc: Observational documentary in which a couple move in with the man's ex-wife for a week in an attempt to heal old wounds and allowing them to get to know each other as individuals and not as enemies. This time, Nadine invites her ex Paul and his new partner Mursine to live with her because she knows nothing about the woman who now helps to care for her children. With two strong women connected to Paul and the children, all the adults are apprehensive about the week-long experiment

programme.title: McDonald's vs Burger King: Burger Wars
programme.desc: Documentary examining how the fast food giants grew from humble origins to become two of the most recognisable brands in the world. The programme assesses the chains' marketing ploys and promotional techniques, while vloggers and food critics compare the rivals' most notable products and the ways in which they are presented. Industry insiders also reveal the secrets behind both chains' success and how they see off the competition

programme.title: It's Your Fault I'm Fat
programme.desc: Brighton-based Josh says he eats because he is bored _ and also to drown out the sounds of arguing from his parents. Cameras focus on the 16-year-old who weighs more than 20 stone

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: The Bravados (1958)
programme.desc: A widower visits a town where the men he believes murdered his wife are about to be hanged. When they escape from jail, he takes the law into his own hands and decides to hunt down and kill the fugitives. But over time, he begins to question whether his actions are right. Western, starring Gregory Peck, Joan Collins and Stephen Boyd

programme.title: The Miracle of Morgan's Creek (1943)
programme.desc: A woman spends a night out drinking with six soldiers who are heading off to war and wakes up the next morning to find she is married to one of them - but has no idea which. Comedy, starring Betty Hutton, Eddie Bracken and William Demarest

programme.title: Rage at Dawn (1955)
programme.desc: Three notorious outlaw brothers terrorise Indiana, using a small town as a safe haven and paying off local officials to turn a blind eye. A detective poses as a fellow bandit to set a trap for them, but the case is complicated when he falls for their sister, who remains misguidedly loyal to her villainous family. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Forrest Tucker, Mala Powers and J Carrol Naish

programme.title: Film4 Interview Programmes
programme.desc: Stars and directors talk about the experience of making movies in this compendium of personal and practical reflections

programme.title: The Lady Vanishes (1979)
programme.desc: An American heiress befriends an elderly lady on a continental train journey, but wakes one morning to find she has disappeared and the other passengers deny having ever seen the missing woman - leading to suspicions that a conspiracy is afoot. Remake of Hitchcock's 1938 mystery, starring Elliott Gould, Cybill Shepherd, Angela Lansbury, Herbert Lom, Arthur Lowe and Ian Carmichael

programme.title: Max Steel (2016)
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old McGrath is bewildered and unsettled when he suddenly starts exuding increasingly powerful energy from his fingers. As this power grows to dangerous proportions, Max meets Steel, a small but feisty flying alien who says he can help. Family fantasy adventure, starring Ben Winchell, Maria Bello and Andy Garcia, with the voice of Josh Brener

programme.title: Red 2 (2013)
programme.desc: Former CIA agent Frank Moses reunites his squad of retired operatives for a vital mission. A devastatingly powerful new weapon has been stolen, and it falls to Frank's team to retrieve it - which means facing lethal assassins, terrorists and corrupt government officials out to steal the device. Action thriller sequel, starring Bruce Willis, Helen Mirren and John Malkovich

programme.title: Jackass Presents: Bad Grandpa (2013)
programme.desc: A debauched old man makes a bizarre road trip across America to reunite his eight-year-old grandson with his real father. He takes the youngster through funerals, beauty pageants and biker bars and treats the people he meets to a display of his twisted approach to childcare. Hidden camera comedy, starring Johnny Knoxville and Jackson Nicoll

programme.title: Kaleidoscope (2016)
programme.desc: A man just been released from prison attempts to get on with his life, but the reappearance of his domineering mother scuppers his plans and unearths deep-seated trauma. Psychological thriller, starring Toby Jones and Anne Reid

programme.title: Puss in Boots (2011)
programme.desc: The swashbuckling feline joins forces with a cunning thief and a treacherous old friend to steal a magical golden goose from a giant's castle. He must save the day when it transpires that their actions have unleashed a terrible danger on his home town. Animated comedy spin-off from the Shrek movies, with the voices of Antonio Banderas and Salma Hayek

programme.title: Hotel for Dogs (2009)
programme.desc: An orphaned brother and sister face losing their beloved dog when they go into a foster home that does not allow pets. The kids find the ideal hiding place in an abandoned hotel, and set about transforming it into luxury canine accommodation for not just their beloved pet, but every stray in town. Family comedy, starring Emma Roberts, Jake T Austin, Don Cheadle and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Carry On Nurse (1959)
programme.desc: The patients on the men's ward of Haven Hospital cause more mayhem for the staff than the rest of the hospital combined, forcing the management to send in a formidable matron to control the situation. Feeling aggrieved by her no-nonsense methods, the chaps decide the time is right to get their own back. Comedy, with Kenneth Williams, Hattie Jacques, Joan Sims, Kenneth Connor, Charles Hawtrey, Shirley Eaton and Leslie Phillips

programme.title: Back to the Future (1985)
programme.desc: Teenager Marty McFly travels back to the 1950s in a time machine built by his eccentric inventor friend. The return journey proves tricky enough, but he also accidentally alters the sequence of events that led to his parents falling in love - and has to persuade his future dad to win his mother's heart, or he will never be born. Sci-fi comedy adventure, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson and Crispin Glover

programme.title: Goodbye Christopher Robin (2017)
programme.desc: Biopic of children's author AA Milne, focusing on how his relationship with his son influenced the creation of the Winnie the Pooh stories. The books prove immensely popular in a nation recovering from the trauma of the First World War, but bring the youngster who inspired them uncomfortably into the public eye. Starring Domhnall Gleeson, Margot Robbie and Kelly Macdonald

programme.title: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children (2016)
programme.desc: A boy investigates a series of clues left by his grandfather, and comes across a home for children with special powers, that has been concealed from the world using time travel. It falls to the boy to protect the home and its residents from a race of invisible monsters. Fantasy adventure based on the novel by Ransom Riggs, starring Eva Green, Asa Butterfield, Samuel L Jackson and Terence Stamp

programme.title: Stonehearst Asylum (2014)
programme.desc: A new apprentice at a lunatic asylum is intrigued by the unusual methods of the doctor in charge. He realises too late that the doctor is actually a patient who has taken over with the intent of establishing his own form of society - a plan that leads to chaos. Gothic horror based on Edgar Allen Poe's short story Eliza Graves, starring Kate Beckinsale, Jim Sturgess, David Thewlis and Michael Caine

programme.title: #Horror (2015)
programme.desc: Six pre-adolescent girls face a night of terror when an online social media game goes horrifyingly wrong, turning a moment of cyber-bullying into a night of insanity. Crime horror, starring Emma Adler, Jessica Blank and Ted Christensen

programme.title: The Boxtrolls (2014)
programme.desc: The people of a small town live in fear of underground trolls, who they do not realise are actually harmless. A boy raised by the creatures must convince the townsfolk there is nothing to fear when a team of pest exterminators is hired to wipe out the friendly monsters. Stop-motion animated fantasy, with the voices of Isaac Hempstead Wright, Elle Fanning and Ben Kingsley

programme.title: Capture the Flag (2015)
programme.desc: A young surfer and his friends try to prevent a devious plan to change the course of history when a ruthless billionaire sets out to stop the moon landings from happening, so that he can gain control of a valuable energy source. Animated sci-fi adventure, with the voices of Sam Fink, Phillipa Alexander and Lorraine Pilkington

programme.title: The Indian in the Cupboard (1995)
programme.desc: A nine-year-old boy is given an old cupboard and a toy Iroquois Indian for his birthday - but when he puts the figure inside the cupboard, he is astonished to see it come to life. He repeats the experiment with more of his toys, and realises he is creating real people - and is responsible for their wellbeing. Children's fantasy, with Hal Scardino, Litefoot and Steve Coogan

programme.title: Kubo and the Two Strings (2016)
programme.desc: A boy unwittingly summons an evil spirit to wreak havoc on his peaceful village home. The only hope of defeating the vengeful creature is to find a magical suit of armour belonging to the boy's father - but finding it will entail matching wits with an assortment of monstrous foes. Animated adventure, with the voices of Charlize Theron, Art Parkinson and Matthew McConaughey

programme.title: Snow White & the Huntsman (2012)
programme.desc: An evil queen learns that her reign will last for ever if she kills a princess, so sends a renowned warrior to find and murder her. However, he comes to realise his mistress's evil ways, and instead trains his intended victim to fight so they can bring the tyrant's rule to an end. Fantasy adventure, with Kristen Stewart, Chris Hemsworth and Charlize Theron

programme.title: All The Money in the World (2017)
programme.desc: When 16-year-old John Paul Getty III is kidnapped in 1973, his devoted mother tries to convince his billionaire grandfather Jean Paul Getty to pay the ransom. Ridley Scott's fact-based drama, starring Michelle Williams, an Oscar-nominated Christopher Plummer, who replaced Kevin Spacey a few weeks before the film was released, and Mark Wahlberg

programme.title: Journeyman (2017)
programme.desc: World middleweight champion Matty Burton is nearing the end of his professional career when he suffers a serious head injury during a fight that leaves him with brain damage. Boxing drama, written, directed by and starring Paddy Considine, with Jodie Whittaker, Paul Popplewell and Tony Pitts

programme.title: Sweet Sixteen (2002)
programme.desc: A boy tries to save his jailbird mother from danger on the streets of a Scottish coastal town, by creating a safe haven where she can escape the grasp of the two men in her life. However, his efforts to raise the necessary funds lead him and his friends into all manner of schemes, and he is soon dangerously out of his depth. Ken Loach's drama, starring Martin Compston, Annmarie Fulton, William Ruane, Michelle Coulter and Gary McCormack

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Beaver, Pennsylvania, where he meets a brother-and-sister team who find it almost impossible to work together. Their relationship is so fractured that they're failing to save their father's Italian restaurant Levanti's from being overwhelmed by local competition, and the situation has become so desperate that their dad is in danger of losing his life savings

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam risks bodily harm during an intense game of paintball to impress his latest crush. Erica pretends she has a college-aged boyfriend, but is embarrassed when her friends see right through her deception. Murray's stubborn behaviour causes Beverly to miss seeing the Beach Boys at Live Aid

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After getting telephone answering machines, Murray and Pop-Pop wage a message war on one another, so Erica, Barry and Pops try to reunite them at a hockey game

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Billy believes the sty's the limit as he plans a pig-themed wedding, wanting to use the occasion to put his village Mansfield Woodhouse on the map with a world-record pig parade. Wheher his prim and proper bride Steph will kick up a stink remains to be seen

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: As the vow renewal ceremonies begin, two couples make life-changing decisions. One pair pursue their relationship outside of the experiment, while one couple choose to walk away

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Leonard invent excuses to avoid having to attend Penny's performance in a production of the stage musical Rent, but maintaining the pretence makes matters increasingly complicated. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star, with DJ Qualls

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta faces paying back all the money he has borrowed from his colleagues over the years, and goes to great lengths to keep a secret about Sergeant Jeffords. Santiago and Captain Holt team up to reopen the Brooklyn Broiler arson case

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Sophia's job gets in the way of her relationship with Peralta, he tries to win the favour of her boss Geoffrey (guest star Chris Parnell). Meanwhile, Deputy Chief Madeline Wuntch needs Captain Holt's help with a job recommendation

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Meemaw intervenes when Sheldon gets jealous of Dr Sturgis bonding with Paige, a rival 10-year-old genius. In the meantime, Mary invites Paige's family over for a play date

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Following a tragic accident in the local community, Mary's faith is shaken. Seeing his mother doubt everything she believes, Sheldon becomes an unlikely ally. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage and Zoe Perry

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Raj organise a stag party for Howard, but stories about his sexual history are unwittingly revealed, and he has to persuade bride-to-be Bernadette not to call off the wedding. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard tries to use his wedding as an excuse to avoid being sent into space, but ends up accepting the mission. Amy plots to get Sheldon to take the next step in their relationship, while Leonard accidentally asks Penny to marry him

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Don realise they need to bring in more business, they film a commercial advertising their company. Meanwhile, Andi works up the courage to ask her boss, Bob for a raise

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi set up Adam's boss on a date to boost her spirits in the hope that she will be in the mood to have Adam resume work on the mini-mall. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to join the school tennis team in order to stay close to his best friend Chad. However, when Chad picks Dave Kim as his doubles partner, Adam vows to team up with Barry to beat them in a match. Beverly helps Erica to get through her post-break-up depression in time for Valentine's Day. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica is jealous of Barry's outstanding performance when they both get after-school jobs at Spencer's Gifts selling novelty presents at the shopping mall. Murray insists that Adam must get a job too, but Beverly thinks he should focus on his filmmaking instead

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago go undercover as an engaged couple in a bid to catch an identity thief, and find that the investigation brings them closer together. Meanwhile, Boyle organises a surprise birthday party for Rosa. Comedy, with Andy Samberg and Melissa Fumero

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: After Captain Holt is transferred to the NYPD Department of Public Relations, the arrival of a new captain causes the precinct to dissolve into chaos - despite the best efforts of Sergeant Jeffords. meanwhile, Peralta and Santiago face the aftermath of their kiss. Kyra Sedgwick and Bill Hader guest star

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: When Sheldon becomes ill and spends a few days in hospital, he turns into the world's worst patient. His behaviour takes a toll on everyone, and Missy gets a taste of what her life would be like if she didn't have a twin

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The young genius tries to build a nuclear reactor to power the neighbourhood. A university cocktail party gets heated when Dr Sturgis' colleague, Dr Linkletter, flirts with Meemaw, and Georgie is heartbroken when he learns Veronica has a boyfriend

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends try to solve the mystery of Sheldon's post-lunch activities, following him to a secret room where they discover how he chills out. Elsewhere, Leonard is jealous when Penny starts texting a classmate, but things quickly change when Alex gets flirty with him

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon feels undermined when his parking space at the university is allocated to Howard instead, and his determination to cling on to the spot causes a rift in the pair's friendship. However, the battle between the boys pales in comparison to that waged by Amy and Bernadette, whose disagreement on behalf of their significant others becomes increasingly personal. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Looking back at a classic episode from 2003. Debbie Dean and Dan Hunter are at breaking point, and Ellie is scared after finding out that Toby attacked Steph

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The couples say goodbye and return home to deliberate the biggest decision of their lives - do they want to continue their relationship after the experiment?

programme.title: Fantastic Four: Rise of the Silver Surfer (2007)
programme.desc: The super-powered team takes on a mysterious alien who has been sent by his planet-eating master to prepare Earth for obliteration. While the four heroes try to find a way to foil its plans, an old enemy returns, intent on seizing the extraterrestrial's power. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Ioan Gruffudd, Michael Chiklis, Chris Evans and Jessica Alba, with the voice of Laurence Fishburne

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Buffy is troubled by strange dreams of a girl fleeing mysterious hooded attackers. Xander comes to the aid of a woman being pursued by a large worm-like monster that burrows underground. Meanwhile, Spike tries to rejoin the gang, but his soul continues to torment him

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer

As she searches for the gang, she finds a body that has been skinned alive - the same way she killed Warren. Fearing her friends will think she is still evil, she goes in search of the real killer and falls into the clutches of a skin-eating demon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

After Amy's apartment floods, she proposes a cohabitation experiment with Sheldon to stay with him while her apartment undergoes repairs

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Howard and Bernadette cancel their holiday plans when Bernadette feels unwell and decide to have a secret stay-cation at home instead. However, the pair are soon disturbed by unexpected guests dropping by

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Single mum and occasional poet Frankie hits it off with primary school teacher Charlie, but will he still be interested when she reveals she has children? Olive and Terence are both in their eighties and haven't given up on finding someone special. As they bond over memories of lost loves, tennis and amateur dramatics, Olive hopes Terence will ask her to the theatre. Divorcee Karen, 34, is pleased that Mitch seems to tick all the boxes, while 25-year-old Anita has drawn up a checklist in her search for a perfect match. Her blind date is international rugby player Max, who has never been in a relationship but wants to settle down

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.title: Man with a Plan

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Don realise they need to bring in more business, they film a commercial advertising their company. Meanwhile, Andi works up the courage to ask her boss, Bob for a raise

Peter's family is concerned the business is becoming trapped in the past, and standards are slipping, but he seems determined to stick to his guns

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the coastal community of Long Beach, California, to save an Italian restaurant that was opened in 1958 and now under the misguided leadership of Nino, who blamed by brother Michael and sister Carina for the eatery's failings. Their 78-year-old mother Inge desperate for Nino to turn the business around, but the feuding family members will have to solve their differences first

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Australian-born Adam plans a 1980s Aussie soap-themed wedding in South Shields, despite the wishes of his fiancee Rachel, who dreams of a classy, sophisticated ceremony

programme.title: Man with a Plan

programme.title: Man with a Plan

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry enlists his friends to help him break up Beverly's social group in order to get more of his mother's attention, but when big arguments ensue he realises he's made a major error. Adam's attempts to trick Murray into loving the theatre backfire

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Hoping to enjoy a true spring break experience, Erica and Barry pay a visit to Pops in Florida, but the jaunt isn't what they expected. Adam tells the truth to his parents when he has a mishap with Beverly's new coat, but he gets a surprising reaction

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly takes up dancing with her friends but is dejected when her family is unimpressed by her intention to perform a dance routine in a recital. Adam worries about losing his friendship with Emmy when she starts dating a handsome older classmate, but his attempts to be cooler than the newcomer backfire

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

As the pair's squabble quickly escalates into a full-blown argument, the rest of their friends turn up for a planned Game of Thrones viewing party, and end up taking sides in the dispute - resulting in two warring factions taking up residence in 4A and 4B. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang goes to a bar and runs into Penny's old boyfriend Zack, while Bernadette is left to spend the evening with Sheldon when she cannot go wine tasting with the others. Elsewhere, things do not go to plan when Raj introduces his new girlfriend, Claire. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon discovers a surprise screening of The Avengers is scheduled at a local cinema, complete with a Q&A session with the film's director, Joss Whedon. However, the event just happens to clash with time he'd planned to spend with Amy, so he decides to pay Stuart to be his subtitute for the afternoon while he and the other boys immerse themselves in Marvel superheroics. Meanwhile, Leonard's mother Beverly arrives in town for an extended visit, and Penny takes the opportunity to bond with her new mother-in-law - and to make up for not inviting her to the wedding. Comedy, guest starring Christine Baranski

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Home Alone (1990)
programme.desc: A boy has to fend for himself when he is accidentally left behind after his family jets off to Paris for Christmas. The youngster initially enjoys his freedom, but is soon forced to resort to ingenious booby traps to defend the family home from two dim-witted burglars. Comedy, starring Macaulay Culkin, Joe Pesci, Daniel Stern, John Heard, Catherine O'Hara and John Candy

Crime thriller, starring Jesse Eisenberg, Mark Ruffalo, Woody Harrelson and Isla Fisher

Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?
