Erica tells Murray she has made a final decision about her future at college, but he is so furious that he insists she pay her own way for rent and food

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As Adam celebrates his 16th birthday, his parents are too distracted by Barry and Lainey's engagement and Erica's band ambitions to acknowledge their youngest son's big day. However, the situation presents an opportunity for Adam to ask Erica to put him on the high school social map. Meanwhile, Beverly thinks she can scare Barry and Lainey straight with the reality of being adults

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam's girlfriend Jackie returns after spending the summer in New York and seems like a different person. After receiving some bad advice from his loved ones, Adam takes drastic measures to hold on to his relationship. Beverly is not happy with Lainey's domestic skills and decides to teach her future daughter-in-law a thing or two about family catering

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta takes part in an undercover FBI operation that ends in a mass arrest. But when one of the mobsters escapes he enlists Boyle's help in tracking him down. Captain Holt tests the squad's patience with practice drills in which Sgt Jeffords plays different roles, while Gina pleads with Boyle to keep a secret. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holt is taken by surprise when his long-time nemesis, Deputy Chief Madeline Wuntch (guest star Kyra Sedgwick), arrives to carry out an inspection of his precinct. Peralta and Jeffords test the boundaries between 'work friendship' and 'real friendship' while they investigate a stabbing at a trendy milk bar. Boyle searches for a guest to take to his ex-wife's engagement party - will Diaz come to the rescue?

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad has time to kill when the arrival of the Serbian president's motorcade to Brooklyn is delayed, so Peralta launches the seventh annual Jimmy Jab Games, an eccentric series of races and contests held in the precinct building. Meanwhile, Jeffords and Holt must set up a new drug task force approved by Holt's nemesis, Madeline Wuntch

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends struggle through an awkward morning after Sheldon's mother and Leonard's father share an evening together. Penny's family arrives in town to attend Penny and Leonard's second wedding ceremony. Keith Carradine, Laurie Metcalf, Christine Baranski and Judd Hirsch guest star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard has a meeting with Colonel Williams, a representative from the Air Force Department of Material Command, about the gyroscope he invented with Leonard and Sheldon. Penny accidentally reveals that Bernadette is pregnant to their colleagues at work. Dean Norris guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tensions rise when the guys struggle to complete their Air Force project on time and are forced to work around the clock - leaving Sheldon fighting to stay awake. Penny and Amy attend a university gathering at the home of Bert the geologist. Raj learns Bernadette's true feelings about her pregnancy when he helps her to clear out the spare room for a nursery

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard and Bernadette decide they do not want to know the gender of their unborn child, but are upset when they hear Raj has found out before they have. After Amy's apartment floods, she proposes a cohabitation experiment with Sheldon to stay with him while her apartment undergoes repairs

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Things don't run smoothly as Amy and Sheldon's cohabitation experiment continues, forcing Leonard and Penny to intervene when the couple have an argument about the 'bathroom schedule'. Howard and Bernadette cancel their holiday plans when Bernadette feels unwell and decide to have a secret stay-cation at home instead. However, the pair are soon disturbed by unexpected guests dropping by

programme.title: Home Alone 3 (1997)
programme.desc: Cheeky eight-year-old Alex Pruitt is delighted to be given a remote-controlled toy car by his neighbour - unaware it contains a stolen microchip. A gang of crooks heads to Alex's town with the intention of recovering the valuable item, but the resourceful youngster has prepared for their arrival with a series of nasty booby-traps. Comedy sequel, starring Alex D Linz, Olek Krupa, Rya Kihlstedt and Lenny von Dohlen

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War (2016)
programme.desc: Eric and fellow warrior Sara, raised as members of ice Queen Freya's army, try to conceal their forbidden love as they fight to survive the wicked intentions of both Freya and her sister Ravenna. However, as war between the siblings escalates, Eric and Sara unite with Freya in an attempt to end Ravenna's wicked reign once and for all. Fantasy adventure, starring Chris Hemsworth, Charlize Theron, Emily Blunt and Jessica Chastain

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during October, 2016, including The Apprentice, National Treasure, Terminator 2, Celebrity Island with Bear Grylls, The X Factor and the News

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching in late October 2016, including Hunted, Poldark, Meet the Parents, Strictly Come Dancing, The Young Pope, The Great British Bake Off and the News. The programme captures their instant reactions and lively - sometimes emotional - discussions from the comfort of their own homes

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny discovers she has a dedicated group of fans from her Serial Ape-ist days when she accompanies Leonard to a comic-con. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Amy host a brunch at Penny's flat, and stress over the baby's arrival prompts Howard to make an impulsive purchase

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After the repairs are completed in Amy's flat, she lies to Sheldon by telling him that the work is still ongoing so they can carry on living together for a while longer. Leonard is upset when he finds out Penny has been moving his collectibles out of Sheldon's old room and into storage behind his back

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Mula, 23, was stood up on her last visit to the restaurant, and she's hoping round two will be better. Funnyman AJ, also returning, tries to seduce her with his best jokes. Could it be second time lucky? Geordie postie Jodie is back after being 'friend-zoned' last week, and she's pleasantly surprised by Irish beauty Louise. Tom is a suave, confident restaurateur looking for a refined lady, but dance teacher Alliee isn't immediately impressed by his well-rehearsed advances, including petrol-station flowers and champagne

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during October, 2016, including The Apprentice, National Treasure, Terminator 2, Celebrity Island with Bear Grylls, The X Factor and the News

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp is taught how to bind books by expert Isabelle Ting, and reveals how to create a notebook from leftover materials including leather offcuts, recycled leather coats and decorative paper

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: With their five children all grown up, Maria and Laky Zervudachi want to downsize and find two new properties to call home. They want a family home close to their favourite town of Lewes in Sussex, so that friends and a community are nearby, and a smaller apartment in sunny Palma in Mallorca so that Maria can practise yoga outdoors all year round. Jasmine Harman shows them three impressive family properties for their budget of £900,000 in and around Lewes and Jonnie Irwin lines up three possible apartments for £300,000 in Palma

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole head to Middlesex and Surrey, where projects include repurposing a 1950s hairdryer, updating a school desk and the restoration of a child's motorbike

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel the length of Britain turning unwanted junk into profit for their owners. In this episode they're on the south coast, where Henry gets to work an aircraft fuel tank while Simon gets obsessed with an iconic '60s speedboat

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie sets out to restore the chateau's greenhouse, which has been damaged in a storm. Lee and Belinda get a 60th birthday booking so race to get their garden venue ready

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton visits Devon to meet glass-blower Siddy Langley, who plans to build a combined home and studio, as soaring costs mean she can no longer afford to run her furnaces. The presenter is on hand to offer practical advice and encouragement, but there is little he can do when things begin to go seriously wrong

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the Golf House on the Isle of Wight, where hosts John and Sue Blakemore hope to impress their guests during their stay. Things start off positively with a well-received breakfast, but a suspicious stain in a toilet causes controversy among some of the competitors

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to St John's Wood, north-west London, where Nick Tyrie and his friend Layla Amini welcome their guests to the New Inn Pub. One of the proprietors tries to win points by revealing her musical past, but John and Sue Blakemore feel their room is too impersonal, and are underwhelmed by the choices at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At the Bunkroom hostel in Chester, David Sharrock is determined to prove that hostelling is for everybody - even if his wife Victoria isn't convinced. It's bunkbeds and budget breakfasts for all, as his fellow hosts decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The group heads to John Graham's the B&B in Blackpool for the final visit of the week, and an afternoon of tenpin bowling brings out the guests' competitive sides. Later, there is more tension at the dinner table when the host is subjected to aggressive questioning by John and Sue Blakemore

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants featured throughout the week reunite to revisit the highs and lows of their various stays, and as the guest house owners confront their critics face to face, they discover what the rival parties really thought of the quality of service that they encountered. After the deliberations are over, the winner is announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Giant otter couple Diego and Icana are the best of friends but have never mated, so keepers hope a new male will have what it takes to relight Icana's fire. Blue morpho butterflies Macuna and Peanut also need to mate, but when their diet of fruit ferments and turns to alcohol, their drunken behaviour might dash Chester's hopes of producing the next generation of butterflies. Cameras also follow the relationship between mum-and-daughter Andrean bears Lima and Madidi, who are fighting over food and personal space. Can the youngster learn to respect her elder?

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet the Tuck family in Long Eaton, Derbyshire, who have grown weary of their cramped, three bedroom semi-detached home. Kirstie offers her thoughts on ways the family could change the downstairs of the property, while Phil sets out to find a suitable house they could buy instead

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie has a month to convert her old stable into a studio for the launch of her art weekends, but when she doesn't see eye to eye with mother Isobel about the design, renovations could take longer than anticipated. Belinda's promised a heated outdoor swimming pool on the chateau's website, so Lee starts constructing a solar panel system. Dick saves cash by getting creative on a new lighting project for Angel's treasury

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows a project by artists Freddie Robins and Ben Coode-Adams to convert a large, Grade II-listed timber-framed barn in Essex into a family home and workspace. Their plans involve a minimal number of interior walls to display their collection of toys, but at seven times the size of an average three-bedroom house, the transformation of the 500-year-old building proves extremely challenging

programme.title: 23 Cases
programme.desc: Tara finds herself kicked off the case for letting Rapp get away and Henry is appointed leader of the team over the heads of more senior members. Tara does not give Henry vital information as having helped Rapp get away she is determined to continue investigating the murders with his assistance. Thriller, starring Shadi Hedayati and Franz Dinda. In German

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Freddie, seven, is brought in after falling several metres from a tree in his garden. He's been in and out of consciousness and doctors are concerned he could have head or spinal injuries. Martin, 66, collapsed at home and spent the night on the floor, and he's now experiencing poor eyesight and dizziness. The stroke team diagnoses a blood clot, but because of the amount of time that has passed since the incident, clot-busting drugs will have little effect. Elsewhere, eight-year-old Jayden has come to St George's with swollen eyes, the result of severe hay fever

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Retired builder Roger has fallen 13ft from his daughter's roof and the trauma team is concerned he may have badly injured his head, back and neck. Folk musician Tad, 29, has come to A&E after developing a dangerously high heart rate, and doctors must use an electric shock to try to get it back to normal. Meanwhile, 69-year-old Richard is brought in after being found unwell at home by his son, and there are fears he has developed a serious infection

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, where he meets a stubborn owner who doesn't react well to criticism. Tom bought the restaurant for his daughter Andrea, but six years later he's still refusing to let her run it. Can the chef break Tom's iron grip on the business and persuade him to change his outdated approach?

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Malcolm, who has had a cardiac arrest, is put under emergency anaesthetic on the hospital helipad. Helicopter medics rush to help elderly driver Bill after his car flips in Whitley Bay. In Oxfordshire, a sidecar race comes to an abrupt end for brothers Paul and Shane

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Freddie, seven, is brought in after falling several metres from a tree in his garden. He's been in and out of consciousness and doctors are concerned he could have head or spinal injuries. Martin, 66, collapsed at home and spent the night on the floor, and he's now experiencing poor eyesight and dizziness. The stroke team diagnoses a blood clot, but because of the amount of time that has passed since the incident, clot-busting drugs will have little effect. Elsewhere, eight-year-old Jayden has come to St George's with swollen eyes, the result of severe hay fever

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Dougal and Ted get involved in yet another bout of rivalry with their counterparts over on Rugged Island - this time by writing a song that will allow them the dubious honour of representing Ireland in the Eurovision-style music contest Eurosong. Ardal O'Hanlon and Dermot Morgan star

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton visits California to investigate why almond butter is more expensive than other nutty spreads. Jimmy Doherty heads to Spain and Portugal to find out how wine is turned into fortified wine, and with help from an innovative farmer and a team of cage fighters, Matt Tebbutt learns why slicing onions makes people cry

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Now all their children have flown the nest, Vanessa and car fanatic Gary want to start the next phase of their lives by setting up a new home. The problem is Vanessa wants to settle in Lowestoft with family and friends nearby, while Gary wants to be in southern Spain where he can be close to Marbella's car scene. Help is at hand from Laura Hamilton, who delivers three homes in Lowestoft for their maximum £195,000 UK budget, while Jonnie Irwin tempts them with three amazing properties in the hills above Marbella with their £178,000 limit

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Angela loves West Malling in Kent and wishes to settle there, but partner Alan is planning on them moving further afield to the sunshine of Spain's Costa Blanca. Jasmine Harman showcases the best their £320,000 budget can offer in Kent, while Ben Hillman shows some stunning homes in Villamartin south of Costa Blanca for their budget of £150,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Retired couple Elizabeth and Phillip want to make the most of their hard earned downtime by doing more of their favourite sports; skiing in winter and sailing in the summer. They've decided to sell the family home and buy two new properties - one near Ipswich Marina, which is perfect for sailing - and the other in Perpignan in France, with world class skiing just an hour away. Laura Hamilton delivers three fantastic homes in Ipswich for this sporty couple's budget of £200,000 and Jasmine Harman finds three characterful properties in Perpignan for their £120,000 French budget

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer go house hunting in Northern Ireland, with Phil searching for properties in Bangor that would be suitable for Lynn, a woman who has been blind since birth. Meanwhile, Kirstie is in Belfast helping a couple of busy doctors who hope to find a home together before they tie the knot

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: New Zealander Steve Levy kicks off a week of dinner parties in Exeter, where he hopes his home-inspired menu consisting of a prawn starter, a fish main course and two desserts will impress his guests - administrator Estelle Macrow, media sales executive Richard Kaye, customer services adviser Sarah Wallis and PR guru Glen King - and make him an early contender for the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Media sales executive and music mad foodie Richard Kaye hosts the second dinner party in Exeter, where he is confident he can impress his guests with his culinary knowledge, and hopes to dazzle one diner in particular

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Self-assured PR worker Glen King is confident she will be the 'hostess with the mostest' in Exeter, and has gone all-out to impress - even co-ordinating the dishes with her surname. She appears to be unflappable in the kitchen and seems to have a plan for everything to fall perfectly into place - but will it?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Customer services adviser Sarah Wallis is the fourth host in Exeter, and despite holding back all week she hopes to come out of her shell with an evening full of humour. The guests are welcomed in a terrifying manner, before being served some rather unusual cocktails

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Exeter, singleton Estelle Macrow is keen to discover whether she has the ability to successfully host a dinner party. Sarah Wallis, music-mad food connoisseur Richard Kaye, New Zealander Steve Levy and PR bod Glen King await her piece de resistance

programme.title: The 100 Greatest Musicals
programme.desc: Part one of two. Denise Van Outen presents a countdown of the nation's favourite 100 musicals of all time, as voted for by the British public. The nominations feature a selection of classic and contemporary films, including Moulin Rouge with Ewan McGregor and Nicole Kidman, the ever-popular The Sound of Music, which starred Julie Andrews and Christopher Plummer, and rapper Marshall 'Eminem' Mathers' cinematic debut 8 Mile. Featuring interviews with Scott Baio (Bugsy Malone), Ron Moody (Oliver!) and Susan Sarandon (The Rocky Horror Picture Show)

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A man suffers multiple injuries after a quad-bike accident on a farm near Penrith. Elsewhere, suspected anaphylaxis following a bee sting has the medics racing to the aid of Melody

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: Rescue stories from up and down the land, following the thousands of volunteers, as well as search and rescue specialists, who put their lives on the line. In Newquay in Cornwall, Rescue 912 race to fisherman Andy after he is washed off rocks and into the Atlantic Ocean, while a fun day out on the water leaves a group of friends and a dog stuck in mud in Cornwall

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside the A&E department of St George's in south-west London. Carole, aged 45, is brought in after collapsing at home with chest pains. Tests reveal she has suffered a heart attack, so she undergoes an emergency procedure to unblock an artery. Philip, a 53-year-old psychiatrist, is rushed in following a seizure. Doctors suspect he might have suffered a stroke, but when it is revealed he was diagnosed with lung cancer several months earlier, registrar Chris believes it could be related. Finally, doctors treat 25-year-old Lucy, who is suffering severe headaches brought on by the build-up of excess spinal fluid in her head

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Staff at St George's Hospital tackle one of their most dramatic emergencies when 60-year-old rail worker Alan is airlifted to the helipad after being hit by a high-speed train. A CT scan reveals he has suffered multiple fractures and loss of blood flow to his right arm. Without circulation he will lose the limb, so the medical team tries everything to save it, including complicated surgery. Meanwhile, 95-year-old Betty is brought in after experiencing breathing difficulties at home, and retired engineer James, 63, has a nasty cut to his head and weakness in his arms following a tumble down the stairs

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Bishop Brennan descends on Craggy Island to investigate rumours that Father Jack has developed the unfortunate habit of sleepwalking in the nude - only to come face to face with his worst fear. Clerical comedy, with Ardal O'Hanlon and Dermot Morgan

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Clare Grogan guest stars as a feminist protest singer who visits Craggy Island and talks gormless Dougal into giving her the parochial house while Ted is out judging a local beauty contest. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Host Jimmy Carr invites Sean Lock and Kevin Bridges to take on guest captain Joe Wilkinson and Victoria Coren Mitchell in the words-and-numbers quiz. Doctor-turned-writer Adam Kay joins wordsmith Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while maths whizz Rachel Riley looks after the numbers

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside the A&E department of St George's in south-west London. Carole, aged 45, is brought in after collapsing at home with chest pains. Tests reveal she has suffered a heart attack, so she undergoes an emergency procedure to unblock an artery. Philip, a 53-year-old psychiatrist, is rushed in following a seizure. Doctors suspect he might have suffered a stroke, but when it is revealed he was diagnosed with lung cancer several months earlier, registrar Chris believes it could be related. Finally, doctors treat 25-year-old Lucy, who is suffering severe headaches brought on by the build-up of excess spinal fluid in her head

A CT scan reveals he has suffered multiple fractures and loss of blood flow to his right arm. Without circulation he will lose the limb, so the medical team tries everything to save it, including complicated surgery. Meanwhile, 95-year-old Betty is brought in after experiencing breathing difficulties at home, and retired engineer James, 63, has a nasty cut to his head and weakness in his arms following a tumble down the stairs

programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw restore a BMW 2002 Turbo for a man who has owned it for 30 years, but has been unable to maintain it due to ill health

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend head to south Wales to rescue a Vauxhall Astra GTE for ex-boy racer Huw. Tim turns to 21st-century science to create the GTE's irreplaceable hubcaps, while Fuzz sticks to what he knows best by rebuilding the high-performance engine. With the car finally ready, the result is revealed to a shocked Huw via a crafty and complicated set-up

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Eastbourne on the south coast to restore a 1962 Mini Cooper. This particular model is the property of farmer Keith, who has raced and rallied cars for most of his life, until being struck down with serious heart problems. Although his racing days are now over, Keith cannot let go of his beloved Mini, even though it has been rotting away in a shed for years

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off in Worcestershire, where friends Geri Atterbury and Lorraine Rigby invite guests to stay at Greenways of Malvern. On arrival, couple Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker are not impressed by the wild wallpaper, and the lack of an en-suite dismays mother-and-son duo Sarah and Luke Allaway

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Royal Forester at Bewdley in Worcestershire for their second stay, with proprietors Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker hoping to impress their guests with a trip to a local safari park. Sarah and Luke are impressed with their colourful room, but Sanjeev and Elinor have a 'hairy' experience

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: From Ferry Lodge in Holyhead, Anglesey, where mother-and-son duo Sarah and Luke Allaway hope to impress the other contestants. However, things do not get off to a good start when Geri and Lorraine are overwhelmed by the number of laminated signs, Sean and Maxine begrudge paying 50p for toiletries and Sanjeev and Elinor are left unimpressed by the cleanliness of the establishment

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Partners Sanjeev Bhagotra and Elinor Roberts welcome their guests to Court Colman Manor, Bridgend, Glamorgan. Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker are pleased with the size of their room on arrival, but Sarah Allaway discovers a collection of cobwebs in hers. During the afternoon, the groups take a lesson in fire-making, and the next morning a traditional Welsh breakfast is not to everyone's taste - with the hosts wondering whether tactical voting has played a part come feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet one last time to find out what they have been paid. Geri kicks off proceedings by demanding to know why Sarah and Luke did not want a return visit to Greenways of Malvern, before they in turn confront Sanjeev and Elinor over their low cleanliness score for Ferry Lodge. Then the Court Colman Manor proprietors accuse Sarah and Luke of unfairly judging their hotel, before the payments are revealed and the winners are announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Alarm-company owner Bill Black kicks off a series of dinner parties in Dundee, where he hopes his belt-busting menu will impress his guests - proud Arbroathian Phil Petrie, English student Hannah Wilson, ferret fancier Alex Pithouse and 28-year-old Kim Gillespie - and make him an early contender for the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Architectural technician Alex Pithouse hosts the second dinner party in Dundee, and aims to impress his guests by giving them an education in fine dining, complete with a complex menu and some good wines, as well as by introducing them to his three pet ferrets

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Vegetarian Hannah Wilson prepares an Italian feast for her guests in Dundee, and in a bid to win over her carnivore guests she devises a cunning plan that involves dishing up some meat with the starter

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The fourth night in Dundee is hosted by self-styled food critic Phil Petrie, who has been unimpressed with the culinary standard so far. He hopes to impress with his evening, but things begin to go wrong when he runs out of ingredients and leaves his guests feeling hungry

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Dundee, Kim Gillespie plans an ambitious menu, largely based on Yorkshire delights, with exotic dishes from Spain and Thailand also featuring - all accompanied by a Scottish choir singing American songs

programme.title: The 100 Greatest Musicals
programme.desc: Denise Van Outen concludes the rundown of viewers' favourite musicals, counting down from 50 to number one. Featuring interviews with stars including Scott Baio (Bugsy Malone), Lee Curreri (Fame), Ron Moody (Oliver!) and Susan Sarandon (The Rocky Horror Picture Show), as well as directors, writers and producers including Randal Kleiser (Grease), Rob Marshall (Chicago), Alan Parker (Evita, Fame and Bugsy Malone) and Cameron Mackintosh and Willy Russell (Blood Brothers). Plus, Omar Sharif, Elaine Paige, Michael Ball, Claire Sweeney, Jonathan Wilkes and Miss Piggy are among the contributors who reveal the impact these musicals have had on their lives

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Tim and Philomena O'Donovan, who are trying to convert the old lifeboat station in Tenby, Pembrokeshire, into a contemporary home and preserve the historic building for posterity. A weather-worn, rusting and rotting hulk that was never designed for habitation, it is perched on a steel pier 40ft above the sea and can only be reached by crossing the sandy beach at low tide

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: In the Lakes, there's a dramatic mountain rescue for injured climber Richard after a fall of 600 feet. A night on Hart Crag for four campers is called short in the face of huge winds blowing up. And in the Cairngorms, new team member Emma joins a dangerous search for lost walkers

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Documentary following the emergency services in Wiltshire, focusing on car crimes committed by young drivers. PC Nick Denning is dispatched in pursuit of a 'pool car' - a cheap, unregistered car shared by several friends - which is currently being driven at breakneck speed around residential streets. Other officers pursue suspected joyriders, and are shocked to find the driver is only 14

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Eleven-month-old Isabel is rushed to St George's after suffering a seizure and losing consciousness, while 22-year-old Felix is brought to A&E with a self-inflicted stab wound to his stomach. Retired engineer Bill, 68, fell 15ft from a ladder while cutting a leylandii hedge. He arrives by air ambulance with breathing difficulties and suspected multiple fractures

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Beaver, Pennsylvania, where he meets a brother-and-sister team who find it almost impossible to work together. Their relationship is so fractured that they're failing to save their father's Italian restaurant Levanti's from being overwhelmed by local competition, and the situation has become so desperate that their dad is in danger of losing his life savings

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: In the Lakes, there's a dramatic mountain rescue for injured climber Richard after a fall of 600 feet. A night on Hart Crag for four campers is called short in the face of huge winds blowing up. And in the Cairngorms, new team member Emma joins a dangerous search for lost walkers

Other officers pursue suspected joyriders, and are shocked to find the driver is only 14

programme.title: Father Ted

programme.title: Not Going Out

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee wants to create the perfect Christmas for Lucy, so he invites her to spend the holiday in a cosy old country house that used to belong to his dear, dead old aunt - and to make it a proper family get-together, he invites along her parents and dipsy friend Daisy. But the Christmas spirit is in short supply when Lucy discovers that the cottage has not been lived in for years - and it isn't long before they have sensed a spooky presence. programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Offbeat tourism show in which Richard Ayoade is joined by celebrity guests to enjoy the most efficient weekend break possible. He begins in Barcelona with comedienne and actress Kathy Burke, experiencing the best of this popular holiday destination in just 48 hours. The pair sample adventurous cuisine, including potatoes coated in edible clay, and a cava tasting session quickly descends into disarray. Other highlights include a visit to the Barcelona Football Club museum, a guided tricycle tour, and a trip to see the surrealist work of Catalan artist Joan Miro

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by fellow comedian Adam Hills on a whirlwind weekend in Turkey's largest city. He wants to show The Last Leg host how to holiday with ruthless efficiency, as they cross the River Bosphorus from Europe to Asia, comparing a private yacht tour with the low-price public ferry. The pair have an authentic Turkish shave at a local barbershop that turns out to be a lot closer than they were expecting, and share an awkward moment at a local bath and massage parlour. There's also a visit to the Grand Bazaar market, where both men have a go at haggling

programme.desc: The story of Orson Welles' infamous radio adaptation of HG Wells' The War of the Worlds, which many Americans mistook for a news broadcast about a real alien invasion

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: A serial killer who terrorised London in 1942, using the chaos of the Blitz as an opportunity to attack women

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: The sabotaging efforts of Peugeot in Nazi-occupied France, where the bosses and workers cooperated closely with the Resistance to hinder the use of military vehicles by the Nazis

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Baddesley Clinton, a moated manor house near Birmingham. Items brought in to be valued include a diamond bracelet once worn by Rita Hayworth, a wooden peg that was removed from a child's eye in the 1870s, a painting by Lord Mountbatten of his family home and a controversial carving of St George that offended a church's parishioners. One visitor brings in a rare wooden pedestal, and is chastised by one of the Roadshow experts for stripping it of the original paintwork

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The underground base with the power to destroy a nation, the site linked with an attempt to kill a vicious dictator, and an ancient world discovered in the open American wilderness

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: In Plymouth, Michael Portillo finds out about the Royal Navy's fighting spirit and mixes his own blend of 'ruin'. Then, crossing into Cornwall, he learns about the last bridge to be built by renowned engineer Isambard Kingdom Brunel. By Tre, Pol and Pen, the ex-politician comes to know Cornishmen and how to prepare the perfect pasty. This leg of his journey ends in a small village, which in Victorian times became a hub of global communications

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo sets out from Birmingham on the first leg of a trip to Dartmoor, and a visit to the city's town hall reveals a magnificent organ and the location for a celebrated music festival. Travelling south to Kidderminster, he works in a Royal Mail sorting office and discovers more about great postal innovator Rowland Hill, before he ending his journey in Worcester, where he learns about the origins of the British Medical Association

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the second of two episodes from Bolsover Castle in Derbyshire. Items brought in to be valued include a painting by DH Lawrence, a broken pot with a connection to the abolition of slavery, a 19th-century pistol, a collection of vintage hats, a complete set of Famous Five books and a rare jade pendant dug up in the garden of a 17th-century house

programme.title: The Architecture The Railways Built
programme.desc: Tim Dunn follows his family's roots by exploring Metroland, the area around the Metropolitan Railway, and in Great Malvern learns about the woman behind a decorative 1860s station

programme.title: Secrets of the Manor House
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the story of Highclere Castle, the setting used for TV drama Downton Abbey, including an insight into the lives of current residents Lord and Lady Carnarvon

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Claustrophobic prison cells that contain a story worthy of international acclaim, and a vast mountainside complex that held the power to change the world

programme.desc: Scientist John Fennel hosts the second party in Birmingham, and decides to prepare an ambitious menu that makes use of his skills in the lab. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson helps Ravin and Pritti from Surrey find a new permanent home for themselves and their family in Gran Canaria, lining up five options within their budget of £180,000

programme.desc: Mother-of-two Currina seeks a holiday home along Spain's northern Costa Cálida. Whether any will prove the perfect one for Currina remains to be seen

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: On St Mary's, Charlotte Hicks returns to the place of her birth to become the Isles of Scilly's only midwife, and the first mum due to give birth off the Cornish coast is her childhood friend Meriel King. At the edge of Dartmoor National Park, woodman John Williamson takes on new apprentice Jordan Harris, and Torquay's harbour master Nick Burns needs to replace a 140-metre section of harbour that will help protect the millions of pounds worth of yachts berthing in the winter months

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: An episode following the stories of fathers and sons and the bonds between them. John is rushed into St George's with a life threatening abdominal aortic aneurism. As the doctors work out whether they can save the 77-year-old's life with emergency surgery, his only son discusses the prospect of losing his father. Elsewhere, cameras follow Jamie, whose motorbike collided with a car on a motorway slip road on his way to work, and carpenter Noel arrives in A&E after partially amputating his thumb

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sandra Dee's, a seafood and barbecue restaurant in desperate need of a renovation in Sacramento, California. His team have just 24 hours to refurbish the establishment, and Gordon creates an exciting new menu by incorporating existing dishes and elevating them to a higher standard. Will returning customers be impressed by the changes?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's armchair critics share more of their critiques of the week's biggest and best shows. They've been watching Who Wants To Be A Millionaire?, (Un)well, Extinction: The Facts, Des, The Third Day, BBC News on the R number, and Breakfast with Michael Gove on Brexit

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics return to share their opinions on shows including (Un)well, When Harry Met Sally, Countdown, Britain's Got Talent, Mary Berry's Simple Comforts, Elephant Hospital, BBC news reports on quarantine, and young people and Covid, and ITV news coverage of Brexit

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: James Blunt, Alison Hammond, Alex Jones and Joe Sugg take part in the charity culinary challenge, under the watchful eye of presenters Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding, and judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith. For the signature round, they must prepare a batch of decorated traybakes, while the technical challenge involves a classic British staple. Finally, for the Showstopper, they must create a scene out of biscuits depicting what they wanted to be when they grew up

programme.title: 100 Vaginas
programme.desc: Documentary artist Laura Dodsworth photographs 100 women and interviews 18 of the participants, aged between 19 and 77, and asks them about how their vagina has shaped their lives. They share their experiences of starting periods and pubic hair grooming, the trauma of rape and FGM, and the joy of orgasms

programme.title: When Cruises Go Wrong
programme.desc: In a typical tourist season, around two million British people will take to the seas for the holiday of a lifetime promising class, elegance and refinement. However, as this documentary reveals, it's not always plain sailing. Cameras capture the downside of cruising, from sickness and crime to terrifying weather, collisions and emergency evacuations

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking Family Favourites
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver pulls out all the stops with his 'totally bonkers sausage and mash pie'. It's not a pie with mash on the side, or even a pie with mash on the top - Jamie uses golden mashed potatoes instead of pastry to encase a beautiful leek, sausage and apple stew. Jamie also gives Britain's favourite takeaway, fish and chips, a home makeover that involves no deep-frying, making it both safer and healthier for the family. With help from his son Buddy, Jamie encases the fish in golden breadcrumbs that are shot through with smoky bacon, before serving it with smoked paprika potato wedges, mashed-up green veg and a light minty sauce

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Mojito, a Cuban cafe in Brooklyn, New York. The restaurant was the shared dream of two newlyweds who have separated since its opening, and whose constant public quarrelling is distracting staff and driving customers away

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's armchair critics share more of their critiques of the week's biggest and best shows. They've been watching Who Wants To Be A Millionaire?, (Un)well, Extinction: The Facts, Des, The Third Day, BBC News on the R number, and Breakfast with Michael Gove on Brexit

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics return to share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows. This latest run is scheduled to extend for the next 15 weeks

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Singletons hoping to pair up over dinner include healthcare assistant Anthony, who wants to put his wild past behind him. Is speech therapist Lawrence 'the one'? Wedding singer Georgina has a blind date with property developer Adam, who prides himself on knowing how to treat a woman, while receptionist Bev sits down with former bank manager Howard, who is strangely familiar

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the importance of the father-son relationship and the potential consequences and difficulties when this relationship is not a positive one. Frontline officers talk frankly about their experiences of how the breakdown of this pivotal formative experience can lead to young men perpetuating cycles of violence, lacking confidence, or struggling with mental health problems

programme.title: When Cruises Go Wrong
programme.desc: In a typical tourist season, around two million British people will take to the seas for the holiday of a lifetime promising class, elegance and refinement. However, as this documentary reveals, it's not always plain sailing. Cameras capture the downside of cruising, from sickness and crime to terrifying weather, collisions and emergency evacuations

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Five people from Swindon take turns trying to throw the perfect dinner party. International DJ Mark Eteson hosts the first night and hopes his Ibiza-style menu featuring Bora Bora Beach brownies, paella and fishcakes will be a hit, before challenging his guests to a rave-off which he will judge himself

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Amateur dramatics enthusiast Michaela Kearns hosts the second party in Swindon, but admits she is not much of a cook. She hopes to dazzle her guests with a glamour-filled evening featuring melted chocolate with dipping treats, but anticipates she might not be able to persuade her fellow diners to take part in her planned show tune performance - complete with a full band

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Financial advisor Scott Hillier hosts Swindon's third party, hoping to impress his guests with a Wild West-themed evening. Tensions run high as Gill Bright awkwardly apologises to last night's host Michaela Kearns and Scott Hillier hopes to smooth things over by performing a rap

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Direct sales manager Sally Rachael hosts the fourth dinner party in Swindon, featuring a 'girls' night in' theme with mysteriously titled dishes and a quirky dress code that leaves her guests clueless and unhappy

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Alternative therapist Gill Bright hosts the final dinner party in Swindon and has plans for an 'upstairs downstairs' Edwardian-themed evening with sophisticated food followed by some circle dancing to Bob Marley

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Helen and David, Vicky and Geoff, and Sara and Thierry take turns to host dinner parties in north London for the chance to win a cash prize of £1,000

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples, Jacqueline and Stephen, Jess and Fred, and Rob and Simon, host dinner parties in Somerset for the chance to win a cash prize of £1,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin assists Joanna and Scott, who met 18 years ago in southern Spain while they were on a golfing trip, and are now searching for a home on the Costa Blanca

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps a couple with £100,000 to spend to relocate to the Charente in western France, where they hope to lead a more relaxed life in the countryside

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Michael and Helen from Shropshire believe that the time is right to relocate to Spain, where they are looking for a new forever home in the province of Valencia

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson helps Ravin and Pritti from Surrey find a new permanent home for themselves and their family in Gran Canaria, lining up five options within their budget of £180,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: After many years of hard work, Debbie and Nick from Salford believe the time is right to buy a holiday home close to the traditional Spanish town of Dénia on the Costa Blanca. Spectacular views at the top of the couple's wish list, so armed with a budget of £150,000, Laura Hamilton sets out to line up five options for them to consider

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. Faye believes she has the weight of the entire restaurant on her shoulders, while Brenda feels she isn't treated as an equal in the business. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his visit to Zayna Flaming Grill in Redondo Beach, California, and finds more questions than answers as he tries to save the crisis-ridden restaurant from disaster. While trying to inject some much-needed flavour into the tired Mediterranean menu, the chef also encourages aunt-and-niece duo Faye and Brenda to settle their differences

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to family owned Italian restaurant Giuseppi's in Macomb Township, Michigan. Father and son Joe and Sam Borgia's constant fighting is driving customers away, and Gordon discovers one of the restaurateurs is concealing a serious health problem. Nevertheless, he sets about rescuing them from disaster and turning around the failing business

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Singletons hoping to pair up over dinner include healthcare assistant Anthony, who wants to put his wild past behind him. Is speech therapist Lawrence 'the one'? Wedding singer Georgina has a blind date with property developer Adam, who prides himself on knowing how to treat a woman, while receptionist Bev sits down with former bank manager Howard, who is strangely familiar

programme.title: Five Guys a Week
programme.desc: Essex-based photographer Chris, haulage guy Lou, shopping centre manager Adam, analytics manager Kris and oven cleaning technician Michael move in with Tara, a 32-year-old business consultant from Halifax in West Yorkshire, each hoping to win her affections. Nearly all of Tara's friends are married, and just about the most serious relationship she had to date has been with Kaiser - her beloved German shepherd. Top of Tara's list of requirements is a man who can make her laugh. Eventually, five become one - will Tara make the right choice?

programme.title: Lodgers for Codgers
programme.desc: With the majority of people under 30 struggling to get on the property ladder, and millions of over-sixties sitting on empty rooms, young and old are tackling Britain's housing crisis by trialling a unique solution - moving in together. This time, Cairo, who was homeless for several years, leaves his temporary accommodation to stay with 66-year-old in-line skater Bonnie, based in Kensington and Chelsea. Meanwhile, Lucy moves in with Viv and Merv in Norfolk, as the 25-year-old tests out lodging as an alternative to living in a camper van

programme.title: Call the Cops
programme.desc: An inexperienced officer ends up in a dangerous high-speed car chase on only his third day on active duty, and then has to deal with an unprovoked attack on an elderly man in a supermarket car park. A former soldier, who lost his leg while serving in Afghanistan, finds policing Exeter a far more relaxing line of work - but a pub brawl tests even his battle-hardened resilience to the limits. Another new recruit has to deal with a gang of marauding football fans who have just knocked out a total strange

programme.title: Lost at Sea: My Dad's Last Journey
programme.desc: Following Louis Bird's journey to piece together the life of his father, Peter Bird, after he disappeared on a voyage at sea in 1996. In 1983, Peter Bird was the first person to row the Pacific Ocean single-handed. Crossing 8,000 treacherous miles in a row-boat, turned Peter into an international legend. On a 1996 voyage, he disappeared, and his empty boat was recovered with a film camera still attached, but he was never found. This programme follows Louis on a personal journey to understand his father, as he and his mother come to terms with feelings of loss and abandonment

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at the White Horse Inn in Maldon, Essex, where owners Jayne and Pete Kocinoga hope their attention to detail will win over their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Third to host this week is manager James Hall and owner's son Adam Neale of The Black Swan in Horsham St Faith, a luxury-roomed establishment with onsite restaurant and pub

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at Delamere Farm near Peterborough, where proud owner Agi Chapman is sent into a spin after hearing some critical comments over breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: The Great British Benefits Handout
programme.desc: Things are looking up for Romford grandmother Lorraine when she receives her trading licence and begins to set up her children's clothes stall. However, just as she is getting into the swing of things, a dramatic turns of events changes everything. Meanwhile, hairdresser Donna gets a shock when she learns how much it will cost to renovate her salon, and over in Dartford, Kim is ready to launch her spray-tan business in style

programme.title: The Great British Benefits Handout
programme.desc: In Romford, east London, 53-year-old self-proclaimed business entrepreneur Lorraine finds the new family dynamic a shock to the system. Now an empty-nester, she is more determined than ever to make her longed-for market stall a success. Adam finally receives good news, Kim arranges a pop-up event at her local gym as her tanning business takes off, and single mother Donna has a much-anticipated trial day at her local hair salon

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Experienced enforcement agent Stewart and trainee Iain head to Blackpool to chase down a builder owing nearly £3,500 to an unhappy customer, while father and son Del and Dael are in Essex to collect over £2,500 owed to a frozen food company. In south London, Del and Brian attempt to recover nearly £10,000 from a debtor who acted as guarantor for a friend's rental agreement, ending in a bizarre stand-off with the debtor's daughter

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben try to drill through the locks on a property to evict the residents, only to find to their surprise that the door has been modified with special reinforced metal. Elsewhere, Delroy and Brian try to reclaim money a garage owes to a customer and are shocked by the condition of the vehicle in question, and a woman who has acted as guarantor for her sister's tenancy does not realise the extent of her responsibilities

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement agents evict a large group of squatters barricaded into a disused nursery in London, and have to resort to smashing their way in as they refuse to leave. Meanwhile, agents in Bristol try to recover over £10,000 owed by a plumbing business to a supplier, and emotions run high when they attempt to evict a tenant who pleads her innocence in West London

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: An episode combining new and unforgettable past cases. The High Court Enforcement Agents head to Manchester to track down over £5,000-worth of debt, and seize an expensive car in the process. Later in south London, the agents deal with a violent debtor who threatens them with a concealed weapon, and in Liverpool, they are met with lies and aggression from a mechanic who owes nearly £3,000

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Dog handler Duncan and the firearms team find themselves in a tense stand-off with suspected drug dealers who could be armed, with German shepherd Tia sent in to search and discovering more than the unit bargained for. Plus, a family booted onto the streets at night by a ruthless aunt, and a man who won't engage with the agents and loses his car

programme.title: Oliver! (1968)
programme.desc: Oscar-winning musical version of the stage play based on Charles Dickens' classic tale about a lonely workhouse orphan who ends up on the cold streets of London, where he falls under the wing of petty crook Fagin and his gang of young backstreet thieves. Featuring the iconic songs Food, Glorious Food, Consider Yourself, As Long as He Needs Me and You've Got to Pick a Pocket or Two. Starring Ron Moody, Mark Lester, Oliver Reed, Jack Wild, Harry Secombe, Shani Wallis and Leonard Rossiter

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Hawkes is persuaded by his girlfriend Camille to call in sick so he can join her at a food festival, but a stall explodes during the event - exposing his deception to his colleagues. The team's investigation reveals that something other than food was potentially being sold by the vendors, and a lead emerges with a link to another suspect

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The detectives suspect a woman's murder could be the work of a serial killer, while Mac reconnects with his first partner, who is being stalked by an ex-con the pair put behind bars. Crime drama, guest starring Peter Fonda, with Gary Sinise

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A bomb is planted in a Wall Street car park, and a woman is apprehended in connection with the crime. However, Stone and Kincaid work to prove the culprit had been brainwashed by Daniel Hendricks, the charismatic leader of a sinister religious cult. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A bar-room brawl results in a baseball player being killed, leading Briscoe and Green to suspect a sporting grudge is behind the killing. However, a very different vendetta comes to light as the evidence points to a man recently exonerated after serving 20 years in prison for murder. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Jerry Orbach's final appearance in the crime drama. Briscoe's investigation into the killing of a delivery man uncovers the married victim's involvement in a website arranging romantic liaisons between consenting adults, and reveals the deceased's wife had recently purchased a gun

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Stone and the team battle against the closed ranks of the Navy when they are called in to investigate the death of a female officer during a wild party. Julianna Margulies (The Good Wife) guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Police action to close down an illegal dog-fighting ring leads to a murder inquiry when officers find a woman's finger inside one of the creatures. As the case deepens, Detectives Green and Lupo must contend with the involvement of a pushy journalist. Crime drama, guest starring Lara Flynn Boyle (The Practice)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Green investigate when an adulterous art dealer is stoned to death. The detectives learn that the victim's plan to display provocative art led to unwanted attention from a terrorist organisation and gives them cause to suspect her son - a fanatical Christian - was persuaded by a religious leader to kill his mother. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team are called in when a Navy reservist returns home to find her husband missing and her living room covered in blood, and make a grim discovery when they find a finger in the bin. Meanwhile, Ziva ruffles a few feathers by insisting on continuing her investigation into the murder of her father, asking for permission to go to Rome on the trail of the chief suspect. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A six-year-old boy begs the team to find his father who, he claims, has been kidnapped. The agents learn the missing man is a lieutenant commander working on a confidential project, but their inquiries lead them to believe he disobeyed orders and deleted the information he was sent to acquire

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Fingerprint evidence implicates Tony in a woman's death and he finds himself accused of murder. Convinced of his innocence, the other members of the team set out to clear him - even though all the facts seem to indicate he is guilty. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An undercover police office is killed by McGee while on duty, and Jenny approves an investigation into the death. But the decision places a strain on her relationship with Gibbs as the team tries to prove that the agent was not culpable, despite the evidence building against him. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sean Murray

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: An old enemy of Angie fakes his own death, then hires her to investigate who is trying to kill him. Guest starring William Shatner

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Novak enlists Clark's help to gather evidence against a judge whose unacceptable bias in two child-abuse cases resulted in the death of a youngster and the wrongful imprisonment of an innocent woman. Police drama, starring Diane Neal, Marlo Thomas, Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A school headmistress is caught on camera sexually assaulting a teenage boy, but her behaviour later proves to have been caused by an operable brain tumour, prompting Novak and the team to allow a plea bargain. Unfortunately, the case turns out to have unforeseen complications. Starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Diane Neal

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A fugitive sex offender kidnaps his accuser, leading Detectives Benson and Stabler to question the man's dying mother to discover where he is heading. She believes her son is innocent and is merely trying to prove he is not guilty by forcing his 'victim' to go back on his lies. Starring Mariska Hargitay, Christopher Meloni and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Investigations reveal that the murder of a college student was linked to his role as pledgemaster of his fraternity, but Stabler and Benson are mystified when the murdered boy's father agrees to represent the accused. Drama, guest starring Serena Williams, with Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Armed robbers break into the apartment of lawyer Roland Carson and make off in a helicopter with jewels worth more than $5million. The detectives investigate and, as people who have come into contact with the gems start to turn up dead, they suspect Carson could have staged the whole affair and killed his accomplices to cover his tracks. Drama, starring Gary Sinise and Carmine Giovinazzo

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A couple whose student son has been missing for a week fear the worst when they discover a badly decomposed body on the roof of a downtown warehouse, and the CSIs are called to investigate further. However, the case is turned on its head when the autopsy reveals the dead man's true identity, and an anonymous phone call leads the team on a wild chase through the city. Crime drama, guest starring Helen Slater

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis reveals how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions, focusing on criminals in London involved in robberies, thefts, drug crimes, street brawls and weapons offences. In Soho, police officers monitor the activity of the area's 100,000 nightly visitors from a CCTV control room in an underground bunker, while in Lambeth the air support unit is called in when an armed gang are seen rampaging through the streets

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A breakdown leaves Jessica and a fellow writer stranded at a run-down desert motel, and it is not long before the amateur sleuth encounters murder, and the gruesome events are revealed through a series of black-and-white flashbacks. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: One of Jessica's former students publishes a best-selling novel, much to the excitement of the citizens of Cabot Cove - but their delight turns to dismay as fiction begins to mirror reality. Murder mystery, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits Montana to celebrate the publication of a dead fellow author's final novel and embarks on yet another murder investigation, forcing her to read between the lines to discover the identity of the culprit. Angela Lansbury stars, with Steve Forrest and Michael Learned of The Waltons fame

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is delighted to run into an old friend while on a shopping expedition in Boston - until he unaccountably denies knowing her. She recruits her dependable ally Harry McGraw to help solve the mystery. Jerry Orbach guest stars

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica takes time out from writing to visit her nephew - but soon has to put on her thinking cap to solve the murder of a TV sports personality. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury and Paul Sorvino

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Part one of two. Jessica receives a visit from Eudora McVeigh, a rival mystery writer with seemingly friendly intentions - but the discovery of a corpse in Cabot Cove leads her to suspect the woman of sinister motives. Starring Angela Lansbury and Jean Simmons

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A trip to Paris - and a chance encounter with a British agent friend - sees Jessica re-routed to Athens, where she gets embroiled in an intriguing mix of murder and espionage. Richard Todd and Ian Ogilvy guest star, with Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Cabot Cove's new priest takes a murderer's confession, and asks Jessica to help him uncover the truth without breaking his sacred oath of absolute confidentiality. Starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The death of an elderly writer prompts Jessica to recall an intriguing mystery that happened aboard the Queen Mary some 50 years previously. Guest starring Robert Vaughn, with Angela Lansbury and June Havoc

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits Palm Springs to check on an investment and finds herself drawn into solving the murder of a property developer. She initially believes the dead man's wife is guilty of the crime, but the suspect's subsequent suicide complicates matters further. Elliott Gould guest stars

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica Fletcher recounts the unusual tale of a private eye who reluctantly recruited a new partner in the form of a French poodle, which once belonged to a murder victim. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A volunteer firefighter is found dead in a burnt-out furniture store. However, Jessica's suspicions are aroused when the post-mortem suggests he was deceased before the blaze started. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The son of a Jamaican plantation owner marries the daughter of a local voodoo priest, leading to accusations, recriminations and murder - which is just the ticket for Jessica Fletcher, who happens to be on the island at the time. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate a rape case involving a girl and her older sister's boyfriend, but when questioned, the suspect claims he committed the crime in his sleep. When a tip-off leads the detectives to a popular online game, they discover what happened to the victim's older sibling, who mysteriously disappeared. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Christopher Meloni

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An accusation that a teacher coerced a 15-year-old student into having sex with her is met with the counterclaim by the now-pregnant woman that she was raped. Novak obtains a warrant preventing her from securing an abortion and subsequent DNA tests confirm the boy as the child's father. Huang's suggestion that a personality disorder drew her to the youngster is undermined by incriminating evidence that casts new light on the case. Guest starring Melissa Joan Hart (Sabrina the Teenage Witch)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The discovery of an African boy's dismembered body leads the detectives to suspect he was killed by cultists as a ritual sacrifice - but subsequent investigations implicate a slave-trading ring operating from Nigeria. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team retraces the final hours of a murdered 16-year-old girl and discover she was pregnant. As the investigation continues, a second death occurs - and their findings have devastating repercussions for two families. Drama, guest starring Jane Seymour, with Mariska Hargitay and Christopher Meloni

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A sniper begins a campaign of apparent random shootings in the city. The team knows that the killings are connected and identifies the criminal as a missing man who was subjected to abuse as a child, but Chief Carver refuses to make the information public, clashing with Mac in the process. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and John Larroquette

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The body of a woman is discovered in a reputedly haunted area of Central Park and first impressions suggest she was scared to death. When Mac returns to the scene, he finds another body and is shocked when this second victim is revealed to be Chief Carver's sister, who had been missing for 15 years. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Columbo: Agenda for Murder (1990)
programme.desc: A crooked lawyer hopes to start a promising political career, but a former client he saved from prison threatens to blow the whistle on him. The attorney murders the blackmailer and makes it look like suicide - but the shabby sleuth sees through his ruse and sets out to expose the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Louis Zorich and Patrick McGoohan, who also directed

programme.title: Columbo: Butterfly in Shades of Grey (1993)
programme.desc: A radio presenter is plotting to sabotage his adopted daughter's plans to publish her first novel and kills one of his employees for trying to help her. He thinks he has the perfect alibi, claiming that the victim was murdered while they were talking to each other on the phone, and there is a tape recording to prove it - but his ruse fails to fool the dishevelled detective. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, William Shatner and Molly Hagan

programme.title: Columbo: Rest in Peace, Mrs Columbo (1990)
programme.desc: The wife of a criminal who died in prison swears revenge on the men she holds responsible for his incarceration - including Columbo. She kills one of her targets, and the shabby sleuth is assigned to the case. As she faces his well-honed approach to sniffing out a suspect, she plots to murder his wife. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Helen Shaver and Ian McShane

programme.title: Columbo: Old Fashioned Murder (1976)
programme.desc: A woman who has devoted her life to running her family's museum is outraged when her brother decides to sell it. Knowing of someone with criminal connections, she arranges to have her brother killed. However, just when she starts to think she has got away with it, a certain shabby sleuth is assigned to the case. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Joyce Van Patten, Celeste Holm and Tim O'Connor

programme.title: Columbo: A Stitch in Crime (1973)
programme.desc: Surgeon Barry Mayfield decides he needs get rid of his colleague to speed along a research project. When his partner requires heart surgery, Mayfield performs the operation himself and discreetly arranges some fatal complications. However, when he also murders a nurse who suspects the truth, he attracts the attention of the slovenly sleuth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Leonard Nimoy and Will Geer

programme.title: Columbo: Murder Under Glass (1978)
programme.desc: The crumpled detective applies his well-honed instincts to a case of blackmail and murder in the world of haute cuisine when a restaurant owner is found dead after throwing a renowned food critic off his premises. Crime drama from The Silence of the Lambs director Jonathan Demme, starring Peter Falk, Louis Jourdan, Shera Danese and Richard Dysart

programme.title: Columbo: The Bye-Bye Sky-High IQ Murder Case (1977)
programme.desc: An accountant who has a reputation as being one of the brightest men in the world realises he has to kill a fellow genius to cover up his illegal activities. He puts his remarkable intelligence to the task of covering up every possible clue that could lead back to him - but has not counted on the equally sharp mind of slovenly sleuth Columbo. Crime drama, with Peter Falk and Theodore Bikel

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Sara Carter begs Gibbs to investigate her mother's murder, as she believes the local authorities have convicted the wrong man. Abby is awarded a dinner reservation for two to a new five-star restaurant in an igloo, and has to decide which co-worker deserves to go with her. Mark Harmon, Pauley Perrette and Skye P Marshall star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the attempted murder of a woman found beaten into a coma, and their only witness is her daughter, who has severe learning difficulties. The spotlight soon turns on the victim's husband, who claims to have found his wife on his return home from a business trip - but the airline passenger list reveals he was not on the flight. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A student counsellor is murdered in New York, and Benson and Stabler investigate a possible connection to her volunteer work at a refugee centre. They discover she had been helping a taxi driver who claimed to have been tortured after the terrorist attacks of September 11, 2001. The trail soon leads the detectives to suspect the involvement of a doctor with links to a company that benefitted financially from the Iraq war

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A bystander is killed in a robbery, traumatising his mentally ill wife, who is later suspected of physically abusing their child. The police take the youngster into protective custody, but a lack of evidence forces them to return him home - with tragic consequences. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The body of a teenage girl is found in the boot of a car, and inquiries soon establish she was a bully who enjoyed picking on other girls - leaving Stabler and Benson with a seemingly endless list of suspects to choose from. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Part two of two. Mac continues the investigation into the killing of Carver's sister and discovers a bullet lodged in the corpse's chest that matches a gun registered to the chief. However, Jo warns him of the consequences of accusing a senior officer of murder. Starring Gary Sinise and John Larroquette

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Jo discover the body of a department store manager in a shop window when they apprehend a pickpocket. They suspect the thief of murder, but his excuse leads them to the victim's assistant, who appears to have planned the crime. However, they unearth evidence that her dead boss had been accused of sexual harassment and had wounds on his body indicating that he might also have been an assailant. Drama, starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward
