Martin is a DIY enthusiast and Kelly works in marketing. They presently live in Tonbridge, Kent, but are tired living in a built-up area

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels to Dartford to meet Scott and Jenny, whose third son Charlie was born with cerebral palsy and developmental delay. The boy needs round-the-clock care, which his mother gave up work to provide, but now he is 13, the family are struggling to cope in their small home. Having heard of their plight, the DIY SOS team turns up to transform their end terrace, backed up by an army of local tradespeople, with designer Naomi Cleaver on hand to ensure they don't stray too far from her vision

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and his crack team of builders, plasterers and electricians come to the aid of Frank and Christine Burrows in Wigan, Greater Manchester. In 2012, the Burrows' 35-year-old son Mark retrained as a scaffolder to follow in his father's footsteps, but was paralysed as the result of an unprovoked attack that left him with severe brain damage. Mark now needs constant care, but the Burrows' family home is not yet fit for purpose, so Frank and Christine have been forced to take their son to a care home 15 miles away. With the help of flamboyant designer Laurence Llewelyn Bowen, Nick's experts set about constructing a self-contained apartment alongside the Burrows' two-bedroom bungalow, which will provide Mark with the space, independence and security he will need to return home for good after spending two years away

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles comes to the aid of Liz and Jason Liversidge, a Hull couple in desperate need of help in future-proofing their family home. Not long after getting married and starting a family, Jason was diagnosed with both Fabrys disease, which causes a build-up of poisonous toxins in the body, and Motor Neurone Disease, which drastically reduced his life expectancy. The pair also discovered that Jason would have passed Fabrys disease on to his two daughters, which means that once her husband is gone, Liz will need all the help she can get in managing her children's condition. Nick joins forces with designer Oliver Heath and an army of volunteers to put together a home in which Jason can build meaningful memories with his girls, but one which also gives Liz the best chance of providing for their future needs

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: It is McMeer's birthday and Zigby and Bertie want to give him the best celebration ever

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Zara's sandcastle vanishes, leaving Zigby to find an explanation for its disappearance

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The lively zebra gets into trouble when he agrees to make McMeer disappear

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Bedtime snacks begin disappearing, so Zigby investigates

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The zebra invents a game that allows everyone to join in

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The crew encounters a sea monster while fishing for clams

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Tjure's laziness causes conflict to erupt between the men and women of the village, and only Vic can make sure everything gets back to normal

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Ylvi and Ylva get stranded on a ledge in the middle of a cliff, but Vic builds a trampoline to save them

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar's crew participates in the Olympic games - and are determined to come out on top

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: A cow swallows a ring Halvar meant to give Ylva on their anniversary, so he is forced to take the animal with him on a voyage in the hope of getting it back

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Gilby, Ylvi and Vic are stranded when heavy rain makes a river burst its banks - and to make matters worse, they are chased up a tree by a bear

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett selects memorable moments from the house-hunting series as she returns to some of her favourite locations. From Woolacombe to Whitby, and Margate to the Isle of Wight, the retrospective illustrates why the English coastline has become the latest property hotspot

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Michael Mosley and the team are in Lancaster to find out how much air pollution a typical family breathes in and whether trees could be the answer to the problem. Chris van Tulleken explores the world of probiotics, Gabriel Weston examines a novel cure for migraines that was discovered by chance in a beauty clinic, and Saleyha Ahsan demonstrates how to revive a victim of drowning

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary goes to the pub to drown his sorrows, so Dermot invites Deborah to their flat for a romantic evening of candlelight, dinner and music. Laddish comedy, starring Harry Enfield and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot is sacked for dangling a customer by the ankles, while Gary, on the other hand, is offered a new post. However, he has difficulty breaking the news to George and Anthea. Laddish comedy, starring Harry Enfield and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: The Big Money (1956)
programme.desc: An incompetent thief finally manages to make his family of crooks proud of him by pulling off a major robbery, but finds his ill-gotten gains bring him anything but happiness. Comedy, starring Ian Carmichael, Belinda Lee, Kathleen Harrison and Robert Helpmann

programme.title: I'm a Stranger (1952)
programme.desc: An Englishman comes to India to claim his inheritance, only to find his grandfather's will has gone missing. To discover what has become of it and acquire his rightful fortune, he needs the help of a detective, a window cleaner - and movie star Greta Gynt. Comedy, starring Patric Doonan and James Hayter, with Gynt playing herself

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Series featuring inspirational walks between from around Britain. Andrew White walks on a disused railway in the Peak District and alongside the Caledonian Canal

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks along the coast at Boscastle and visits Ramsey on the Isle of Man

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps house-hunters looking for a property on the coast to find their dream home

programme.title: Faking It
programme.desc: Individuals take up the challenge to reinvent themselves completely

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A property expert offers advice to British householders aiming to buy a second home abroad

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: Producer Mark Ronson compares notes with Ronnie about their varied approaches to the recording process, and the pair also discuss artists including Amy Winehouse and Stevie Wonder

programme.title: Clipper: Race of Their Lives
programme.desc: Behind the scenes on the record-breaking 40,000 nautical mile race around the world on 70-foot ocean racing yachts. Follow the inside story of what they go through to take part

programme.title: Fox
programme.desc: Drama about a London gangster and his family. Starring Peter Vaughan, Ray Winstone and Bernard Hill. Guest starring Jim Carter (Downton Abbey). Originally broadcast in 1980

programme.title: Purple Haze
programme.desc: Jimi Hendrix died 50 years ago and left us with an amazing legacy of great songs in his own iconic style. The Hendrix Collective perform a set of his songs in tribute to the influential musician

programme.title: The Conversations (2016)
programme.desc: A disillusioned dentist tries to become a stand-up comic, but finds he is unable to perform on stage due to his unrequited love for an American woman who is about to return to the States, never to be seen again. In desperation he seeks a way to have her permanently erased from his memory. Comedy drama, starring Haider Zafar and Daniella Down

programme.title: Mad Dog Morgan (1976)
programme.desc: An Irishman seeking his fortune in the Australian Gold Rush ends up in prison when driven to robbery out of desperation. After 12 years of abuse, he is released and becomes an outlaw, determined to make society pay for his suffering - and becoming a hero to the downtrodden in the process. Fact-based Western, starring Dennis Hopper and Jack Thompson

programme.title: This That and the Other (1970)
programme.desc: Anthology of three comic tales. A fading movie star tries to seduce a producer, a suicidal loner is snapped out of his misery by a hippy, and a taxi driver suffers a blow to the head that leaves him experiencing erotic hallucinations. Comedy, starring Victor Spinetti, Dennis Waterman, Vanda Hudson and John Bird

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps house-hunters looking for a property on the coast to find their dream home

programme.desc: The zebra plans a surprise for Bertie and McMeer

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The zebras watch shooting stars and McMeer decides he wants to have one of his own

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The zebra throws a surprise party for Bertie's birthday

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The zebra dresses up as a postal worker and delivers everyone's mail

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The energetic zebra encourages his friends to find a hobby they enjoy

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: McMeer is upset when Zigby loses his special hat

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The vikings come to the pirates' aid when their ship sinks - only to end up having their own vessel hijacked

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Sven offers Gilby the chance to join his crew if he helps the pirates steal the Drakkar

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The crew mistake an Irishman for a leprechaun, and help him to find his lost friend - who turns out to be a bear

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The King of Sweden accuses Halvar of stealing his jeweled sceptre. Vic must find a way to prove his father's innocence without making the king look stupid

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar lets Faxe steer the Drakkar home, but he becomes obsessed with chasing a whale

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar's grandfather is discovered frozen alive. Once he is released from the ice, he sets out to get revenge on a giant and steal his treasure

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps house-hunters looking for a property on the coast to find their dream home

programme.title: The Cat Gang (1959)
programme.desc: A gang of children is always hanging around a harbour - although the customs officers are always trying to get rid of them. When the youngsters stumble on some shady characters behaving suspiciously, they end up uncovering a smuggling plot. Children's crime drama, starring Francesca Annis and John Pike

programme.title: The Big Money (1956)
programme.desc: An incompetent thief finally manages to make his family of crooks proud of him by pulling off a major robbery, but finds his ill-gotten gains bring him anything but happiness. Comedy, starring Ian Carmichael, Belinda Lee, Kathleen Harrison and Robert Helpmann

programme.title: The Getting of Wisdom (1977)
programme.desc: A snobbish Victorian college for young ladies is thrown into disarray by the arrival of a strong-willed girl from the Outback. Australian drama, starring Barry Humphries, Susannah Fowle, John Waters and Terence Donovan

programme.title: The Wind of Change (1961)
programme.desc: An unemployed teenager in Notting Hill grows increasingly frustrated with his life, his anger manifesting as a deep-seated racism. When he and his friends commit a brutal act of violence on a black man and his white girlfriend, the attack has devastating repercussions for his family. Drama, starring Donald Pleasence and Johnny Briggs

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing New Cross, Eltham and Catford. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks above and alongside two large bodies of water - Ladybower Reservoir and Windermere

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps house-hunters looking for a property on the coast to find their dream home

programme.title: Daddy Daycare
programme.desc: Traditionally minded new father PJ hopes his skills as a management consultant will serve him well when he is sent to spend a week working at Tadpoles Nursery in Chelsea, west London, but his idea of arranging a football lesson for the youngsters ends in chaos. Meanwhile, gay budding parent Richard manages to lose track of two of his charges in an art gallery, and 21-year-old first-time dad Kadmiel gets off to a shaky start when placed in charge of snack time and reading practice for the nursery's four-year-olds

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: A distressed teenager explores cures for hair-loss, and a professional singer tries to save her career by learning to control her severe acid reflux. A mother fears her six-year-old son will be a target for bullying because of his psoriasis, and doctors help an obese father reverse damage done to his liver

programme.title: Sailing Legend: Sir Robin Knox-Johnston
programme.desc: The story of how Sir Robin Knox-Johnston made history when he became the first man to sail solo and non-stop around the globe in 1968-69

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Canary Wharf and Southbank. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones guitarist and former Faces bandmate Ian McLagan reminisce about their time on the road together in the 1970s, and discuss the band's 2011 reunion tour

programme.title: The Legend of Barney Thomson (2015)
programme.desc: A mild-mannered Glasgow barber finds his mundane life turned upside down when he accidentally commits murder. Soon one killing leads to another, and his desperate efforts to cover up his crimes leads him to uncover his mother's dark secrets. Black comedy based on the series of books by Douglas Lindsay, directed by and starring Robert Carlyle, with Emma Thompson and Ray Winstone

programme.title: Helga, She Wolf of Stilberg (1978)
programme.desc: A sadistic female Nazi officer runs a women's prison during the Second World War, and forces the inmates to be her sexual playthings. However, the latest arrival, a determined resistance fighter, proves to be far more difficult to dominate. Prison drama, starring Malisa Longo and Patrizia Gori. In French

programme.title: Melancholia (1989)
programme.desc: A jaded German ex-pat living in London is confronted by his past as a member of a far-left radical group when he's asked to assassinate a Chilean murderer who is visiting London. Drama, starring Jeroen Krabbe and Susannah York

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: 16th-century Europe was a hotbed of tense international intrigue. Mary Stuart and Elizabeth I confront one another on matters religious, political and personal

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Canary Wharf and Southbank. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps house-hunters looking for a property on the coast to find their dream home

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks along the cliffs at Flamborough Head and through Clumber Park, Nottinghamshire

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White treks along the Isle of Man's stunning coast and visits Sprotbrough in South Yorkshire

programme.title: Daddy Daycare
programme.desc: Traditionally minded new father PJ hopes his skills as a management consultant will serve him well when he is sent to spend a week working at Tadpoles Nursery in Chelsea, west London, but his idea of arranging a football lesson for the youngsters ends in chaos. Meanwhile, gay budding parent Richard manages to lose track of two of his charges in an art gallery, and 21-year-old first-time dad Kadmiel gets off to a shaky start when placed in charge of snack time and reading practice for the nursery's four-year-olds

programme.title: Haunters of the Deep (1984)
programme.desc: An American businessman tries to reopen a Cornish tin mine, but the ghosts that haunt the tunnels have other ideas. Supernatural drama, starring Andrew Keir and Barbara Ewing

programme.title: Cup Fever (1965)
programme.desc: A crooked councillor tries to make life difficult for a children's football team, so they will lose a match against his son's side. However, help is at hand from Manchester United manager Matt Busby. Children's drama, starring David Lodge and Busby as himself, with cameos from a host of football stars

programme.title: I Was a Spy (1933)
programme.desc: A Belgian nurse infiltrates German High Command to supply the British with vital information during the First World War One. Fact-based spy thriller, starring Madeleine Carroll, Conrad Veidt, Donald Calthorp and Nigel Bruce

programme.title: Are You Being Served? (1977)
programme.desc: Havoc descends on the coast of Spain as the motley Grace Brothers crew arrive for their annual holiday on the Costa Plonka, which does not exactly live up to the brochure's promise of rest and relaxation. Comedy based on the TV series, starring John Inman, Wendy Richard, Mollie Sugden, Frank Thornton, Trevor Bannister and Arthur English

programme.title: I'm a Stranger (1952)
programme.desc: An Englishman comes to India to claim his inheritance, only to find his grandfather's will has gone missing. To discover what has become of it and acquire his rightful fortune, he needs the help of a detective, a window cleaner - and movie star Greta Gynt. Comedy, starring Patric Doonan and James Hayter, with Gynt playing herself

programme.title: The Windsors
programme.desc: Documentary offering an insight into how King George V changed the royal family surname from Saxe-Coburg-Gotha to Windsor as World War One began. The programme explores his fine upstanding public image and profiles the trials and triumphs faced by his five sons _ especially the heir to the throne

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps house-hunters looking for a property on the coast to find their dream home

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Peter Williams reveals how as Hitler's plans to invade Britain took shape, members of Churchill's Resistance Movement got ready to defend the nation, consulting their specially-prepared instruction manuals on explosives and killing techniques

programme.title: Capital Conversation
programme.desc: London-based current affair series, with Michael Hayman

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: The Princess Elizabeth Cup sees troopers compete to be the smartest in the Household Cavalry. Recruits seeking promotion attend gruelling tests involving live rounds and grenades, and the trainee horse-riders attempt their first canter

programme.title: A London Community in Lockdown
programme.desc: A heartfelt look at life during lockdown in the Listraban community in London, a record of a moment in time that will be in the history books for generations to come

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Closing the Ring (2007)
programme.desc: An old woman consumed by grief following the death of her husband receives a message from a stranger who claims to have found a ring belonging to her that was lost decades before. The discovery brings to light secrets from her past and causes her to look back to the beginnings of her marriage. Drama, starring Shirley MacLaine, Christopher Plummer and Neve Campbell

programme.title: The Conversations (2016)
programme.desc: A disillusioned dentist tries to become a stand-up comic, but finds he is unable to perform on stage due to his unrequited love for an American woman who is about to return to the States, never to be seen again. In desperation he seeks a way to have her permanently erased from his memory. Comedy drama, starring Haider Zafar and Daniella Down

programme.title: Mad Dog Morgan (1976)
programme.desc: An Irishman seeking his fortune in the Australian Gold Rush ends up in prison when driven to robbery out of desperation. After 12 years of abuse, he is released and becomes an outlaw, determined to make society pay for his suffering - and becoming a hero to the downtrodden in the process. Fact-based Western, starring Dennis Hopper and Jack Thompson

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot offers his body and Gary fixes up a burglar alarm in forlorn efforts to impress Deborah

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dorothy welcomes Gary's suggestion of an open relationship, while Dermot continues to woo Deborah

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Bradford City v Northampton Town. Action from the 2012/13 League Two play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where promotion to League One awaited the winners. The Bantams were making their second appearance of the season at Wembley having also reached the League Cup final following an outstanding giant-killing run, and they needed to come from behind to edge out Burton Albion to reach this stage. The Cobblers ended a run of recent poor form to win 1-0 in both legs of their semi-final against Cheltenham Town to move within one match of reaching the third tier of English football

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: Revisiting Washington Redskins' 1987 Super Bowl victory over Denver Broncos at the Jack Murphy Stadium in San Diego, California. Despite trailing the Broncos 10-0 at the end of the first quarter, the Redskins battled back in spectacular fashion, scoring 35 unanswered points in the second quarter alone, as they went on to a secure a memorable 42-10 victory

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: The story of San Francisco 49ers' 1988 Super Bowl success over Cincinnati Bengals at the Joe Robbie Stadium in Miami, Florida. This game is remembered for the 49ers' winning drive in the last few minutes of the game when, trailing 16-13 and with the ball on their own eight-yard line, quarterback Joe Montana led his team down the field and threw the winning touchdown pass with seconds to spare

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: A look back at San Francisco 49ers' 1989 Super Bowl triumph over Denver Broncos at the Superdome in New Orleans, Louisiana, which saw them become the first team since the Pittsburgh Steelers of 1978 and 1979 to win back-to-back Super Bowls
